It requires close collaboration with IT operations, network, and security teams, as well as participation in infrastructure-related projects, system upgrades, and disaster recovery planning.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 Key Responsibilities:
   

  

 - Manage and maintain Active Directory environments.
   

  

 - Ensure domain controller health, replication, and DNS integration are functioning optimally.
   

  

 - Implement and monitor AD security policies and access control measures.
   

  

 - Support hybrid identity solutions involving Entra.
   

  

 - Perform troubleshooting of the environment.
   

  

 - Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts for automation and reporting.
   

  

 - Collaborate with IT operations, network, and security teams to support infrastructure projects.
   

  

 - Participate in system upgrades, patch management, and disaster recovery planning.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 Required Qualifications:
   

  

 - Proven experience administering Active Directory Domain Services (ADDS).
   

  

 - Strong understanding of Windows Server (2016/2019/2022) environments.
   

  

 - Experience with DNS, DHCP, and Group Policy Management.
   

  

 - Familiarity with Entra.
   

  

 - Knowledge of identity and access management (IAM) principles.
   

  

 - Proficiency in PowerShell or other scripting languages.
   

  

 - Experience working in enterprise or multi-domain environments.
   

  

 - Fluent in English, both written and spoken.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 Preferred / Meriting:
   

  

 - Swedish language skills.
   

  

 ﻿
   

  

 Personal Profile:
   

  

 - Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail.
   

  

 - Strong communication and teamwork abilities.
   

  

 - Self-going with a team mindset
   

  

 Required skills
   

 Group Policy Management
   

 enterprise or multi-domain environments
   

 PowerShell / other scripting languages
   

 Windows Server (2016/2019/2022)
   

 entra
   

 DNS/DHCP
   

 IAM
   

 Active Directory Domain Services (ADDS)
   

 Preferred skills
   

 Swedish
   

 Languages
   

 English
   

 (Proficient)

title: IT Service Continuity Management (ITSCM)
description:
We are currently looking for a senior consultant based in Stockholm for an assignment within IT Service Continuity Management (ITSCM).
   

  

 Summary: We seek an experienced, pragmatic, and hands-on consultant with a strong background in IT service continuity and resilience. The ideal candidate will have over 10 years of experience and proven expertise in the field, driving tangible results and ensuring operational effectiveness.
   

  

 Main Responsibilities:
   

  

 Assessing the current IT continuity capabilities.
   

  

 Establishing governance, policies, and ways of working.
   

  

 Defining critical services, dependencies, and RTO/RPO.
   

  

 Ensuring alignment between continuity requirements and third-party SLAs.
   

  

 Designing and implementing testing approaches.
   

  

 Training teams and handing over a fully functional operating model.
   

  

 Key Requirements:
   

  

 10+ years of experience within IT resilience, IT governance, or service management.
   

  

 Proven track record of end-to-end ITSCM implementations.
   

  

 Strong knowledge of ISO 22301, ISO 27001, and ITIL.
   

  

 Experience working in complex and/or regulated environments.
   

  

 Strong stakeholder management skills and ability to translate frameworks into practical implementation.
   

  

 Nice to Have:
   

  

 Experience in developing IT continuity testing frameworks.
   

  

 Knowledge of business impact analysis processes.
   

  

 Familiarity with cloud-based continuity solutions.
   

  

 Other Details: Start: ASAP. Duration: 6 months. Location: Hybrid setup from Stockholm. This is a delivery-focused assignment, intended for someone who can build a practical operating model that is actively used, rather than simply producing documentation.

title: Support Agent
description:
*Binero is a growth company listed on Nasdaq First North Growth Market. We enable sustainable digital development for companies and organisations with our comprehensive range of IT services, from robust IT infrastructure to media content distribution for public activities and 24/7 support. We are the silent engine that gives your business the power to grow.*
*We have three business areas: Cloud Services, Managed Services and Connected Services*
**We are now looking for a committed and driven Support Agent** 
 located in Bromma Stockholm,
   

  

 As a Support Agent, you will play a central role in delivering high quality technical support across our entire support stack. Your primary responsibility is to provide prompt and efficient support for IT-related issues and requests, ensuring minimal disruption to users' daily work.
   

  

**Your Primary Responsibilities Will Consist Of**
* Serve as a key point of contact for customers, handling support inquiries via phone, email, and the service desk platform.
* Take full ownership of support cases from initial analysis to final resolution, including troubleshooting and clear documentation.
* Manage a broad range of technical issues involving hardware, software, networks, user accounts, and mobile devices.
* Perform advanced troubleshooting and collaborate closely with internal 2nd and 3rd line specialists when deeper expertise is required.
* Ensure consistent, proactive communication with customers and close cases only once a sustainable and verified solution has been delivered.
* Administer user accounts and access rights, including onboarding and offboarding workflows.
* Contribute to the creation and improvement of documentation, processes, and knowledge base articles.
* Provide guidance, training, and best practice support to users to help increase their digital confidence and efficiency.
* Actively participate in enhancing our support processes, ways of working, and the overall customer experience.


**Your profile**
 To succeed in this role, you combine strong influencing skills with the ability to build alignment across stakeholders. You’re a skilled negotiator who can reach win-win outcomes while protecting the business’s interests. You communicate clearly and professionally—whether in writing or in conversation—and you present with confidence, tailoring your message to different audiences and making complex topics easy to understand.
   

  

**Education And Experience**
* Experience working in a technical support environment handling cases across multiple support tiers.
* Strong understanding of Windows operating systems, Microsoft 365, and commonly used productivity applications.
* Solid knowledge of hardware, networking fundamentals, and general troubleshooting methods.
* Knowledge with ITSM frameworks such as ITIL is an advantage.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain technical concepts in a clear and accessible way.
* Strong ability to prioritize, stay organized, and work effectively in time‑sensitive situations.
* Service‑minded with an analytical, solution‑oriented approach.


 Does this sound like you? Then we can offer you an exciting and rewarding position in a fast-paced environment at a driven and rapidly growing company with sound values, where humility and freedom under responsibility are key. In this recruitment process, we place great emphasis on your personal qualities.
   

  

 You will report to the Head of Support.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the position, please contact our Head of Support at mattias.lilliehook@binero.com
   

  

*We value security and integrity. That is why we always conduct an extended background check in the form of CV verification, credit checks, and checks of legal events via an external partner before hiring.*
**About Binero Group**
 The Binero Group consists of a merger of Binero, Infrateq, Serit Tromsø and Xpeedio, where we collectively have more than 60 years of experience. We are a customer-focused technology partner that positions itself with ‘Powering Customer Delight’.
   

  

 Whether it's project management for digital transformation, cloud services, digital media distribution, development or IT support, we have the expertise and capacity to
 **deliver top-class results** 
 .
   

  

 Binero has its headquarters in Stockholm and employs approximately 160 people in Sweden, Norway, Finland and Denmark.

title: Consultant (Graduate position)
description:
**In Sweden** 
 - Stockholm
   

  

**What Makes Us Special**
* Become part of a unique entrepreneurial team. Think independently, use your initiative, and take some risks. Entrepreneurship is a powerful force that drives the growth not only of our firm but our clients and people.
* Unlock the power of opportunity. Advance your career in a thriving company that creates positive impact. We invest in your professional development every step of the way.
* Enjoy balance and flexible working. Be empowered to do your best work – whether it’s remotely or in the office. We offer flexible and hybrid working, remote teaming, sabbaticals, and paid time off.
* Work in a values-driven culture. At Simon-Kucher, our vision is to become the world's leading growth specialist. Our values guide the way we do business and communicate our distinctiveness. They sum up what we stand for, influence our culture, and drive how and why we do things.


  

  

**How You Will Create An Impact**
* Support industry leaders and early-stage ventures in driving commercial excellence
* Have impact on our clients’ business success as well as on shaping the future of commercial agenda
* Develop and assess strategic options via targeted business and market insights
* Apply advanced research and analysis methods
* Derive, present and support the implementation of actionable recommendations
* Work in international project teams with diverse cultural and professional backgrounds


**Your Profile**
* Is a recent graduate or a final year masters’ student
* Has or studies towards a degree in business, engineering or other relevant field
* Has an outstanding academic and professional track record
* Excels at solving small and large business problems
* Has entrepreneurial drive to contribute to the growth of the local operations
* Gets fulfillment by helping and working together with people
* Is willing to travel and work in international teams
* Possesses excellent oral and written skills in English and preferably one Nordic language


 If you’re interested, and if you’d like to offer your skills and commitment to our international team, then we would be pleased to receive your application.
   

  

 Hit the ‘Apply Now’ button to begin your application
   

  

**About Simon-Kucher**
 Simon-Kucher is a global consultancy with more than 2,200 employees in 30+ countries. Our sole focus is on unlocking better growth that drives measurable revenue and profit for our clients. As a trusted commercial advisor, we combine deep consulting expertise, growth specialization, and technology to scale impact. We optimize every lever of commercial strategy – product, pricing, innovation, marketing, sales, and digital – based on deep insights into what customers value and are willing to pay for. With over 40 years of experience in monetization, we are regarded as the world’s leading commercial growth and pricing specialist. simon-kucher.com
   

  

 We believe in building a culture that embraces diversity, equity, and inclusion, creating an environment in which our people feel valued, are able to be themselves and feel their contribution matters. If we get that right, remarkable things will happen; people will grow faster, innovate, feel valued, and create better outcomes for everyone – our people, our clients and, of course, our business.
   

  

  

  

**Your Personal Contact**
 Emilia Svedlind
   

  

 emilia.svedlind@simon-kucher.com

title: Customer Support Technician
description:
**Om rollen**
 I rollen som Customer Support Technician inom Storage & Backup har du en viktig, teknisk och koordinerande funktion inom Proact. Du säkerställer att våra kunder får snabb, korrekt och kvalitativ support genom att hantera och distribuera inkommande supportärenden via mail, telefon eller vår supportportal.
   

  

 Genom struktur, samarbete och teknisk förståelse bidrar du till att stärka både kundupplevelsen och samarbetet inom Customer Supportteamet. Tillsammans ser vi till att leverera med hög kvalitet och ge ett professionellt bemötande.
   

  

**Ansvarsområden och arbetsuppgifter**
* Ta emot inkommande felanmälningar från kunder via mail och telefon, samt kategorisera och registrera dessa i ärendehanteringssystemet
* Göra initial felsökning av ärenden och distribuera dessa till respektive expertgrupp
* Hantering och koordinering av reservdelar
* Ge support till säljorganisationen gällande avtal och ta fram rapporter bl.a


 Tjänsten passar dig som är i början av din IT-karriär och som har ett intresse för service och att lära dig mer om IT. Hela supportenheten präglas av ett nära samarbete där alla hjälper varandra. Det råder en nära och positiv sammanhållning i gruppen.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som**
 Som person är du engagerad, serviceminded och gillar att samarbeta. Du tar ansvar för ditt arbete, är nyfiken på att utvecklas och bidrar aktivt till en positiv teamkultur. För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:
   

  

* God förmåga att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift på svenska och engelska
* En stark kommunikativ förmåga och du trivs i rollen som lagspelare
* Ett strukturerat arbetssätt där du kan prioritera och fatta beslut
* Ett problemlösande och serviceminded sätt
* Erfarenhet eller kännedom om Storage- och Backuplösningar


**Vad vi erbjuder**
 På Proact får du arbeta i en organisation med hög kompetens och stark teamkänsla. Vi erbjuder en arbetsmiljö med fokus på utveckling, kvalitet och innovation samt en kultur där engagemang och samarbete värderas högt.
   

  

 Du får arbeta med moderna lösningar och spännande kunder i olika branscher. Vi värdesätter balans mellan arbete och fritid och vi har givetvis kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling.
   

  

 Proact är Europas ledande specialist inom datacenter och molntjänster. Vi levererar flexibla, tillgängliga och säkra IT-lösningar som hjälper företag och myndigheter att minska risker, sänka kostnader och öka produktivitet och rörlighet. Vi finns i 14 länder, har över 1200 medarbetare och är börsnoterade på Nasdaq Stockholm.
   

  

**Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!**
 Låter det här som din nästa utmaning? Skicka in din ansökan redan idag, urval sker löpande!

title: ServiceNow Specialist
description:
**Job Description**

 The ServiceNow Specialist is the digital backbone of People Services, Payroll & Operations (PSP&O). This role ensures that the global service platform (ServiceNow or equivalent) is optimised, user-friendly, and aligned to PSP&O’s ambition of delivering digital, streamlined, and compliant services worldwide. By designing workflows, driving automation, and managing integrations, the ServiceNow Specialist connects technology with the colleague experience, enabling PSP&O to scale services consistently and efficiently across all regions.
   

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO**




 Platform Management
   

  




* Own and manage ServiceNow platform configurations for PSP&O.
* Maintain system performance, upgrades, and ongoing optimisation.
* Ensure global consistency in workflows, forms, and data models.



 Workflow & Automation
   

  




* Design, build, and optimise workflows that simplify and accelerate service delivery.
* Drive Tier 0 self-service through chatbots, automated workflows, and knowledge articles.
* Partner with People Services and Payroll teams to digitalise and reduce manual processes.



 Integrations & Data
   

  




* Integrate ServiceNow with Payroll, HRIS, Finance, and IT systems.
* Safeguard accurate, secure, and compliant data flows.
* Align reporting and analytics functions with Insight & Analytics Specialists.



 Colleague Experience
   

  




* Ensure a colleague-first interface that is intuitive, accessible, and global.
* Gather feedback from users and service agents to improve continuously.
* Balance global standards with regional/local requirements where needed.



 Governance & Compliance
   

  




* Ensure ServiceNow design complies with audit, security, and regulatory requirements.
* Maintain full documentation of workflows, integrations, and platform changes.
* Act as subject matter expert (SME) for ServiceNow in PSP&O transformation projects.



**WHO YOU ARE**




 We are looking for people with:
   

  




* Strong technical expertise in ServiceNow (ITSM/HRSD) or similar enterprise service management platforms.
* Proven experience in workflow automation, service portal design, and system integrations.
* Familiarity with HR, Payroll, or Shared Services operations and processes.
* Strong problem-solving and system design skills with attention to scalability.
* Understanding of data governance, information security, and compliance requirements.
* Hands-on experience building dashboards, workflows, and case-routing automations.
* Ability to translate business needs into digital platform solutions.
* Strong stakeholder management skills across IT, HR, Payroll, and Finance.
* Collaborative, detail-oriented, and proactive in driving continuous improvement.
* Degree in IT, Information Systems, HR Tech, or equivalent; ServiceNow certifications highly desirable.



 Expected Outputs:
   

  




* ServiceNow platform stable, scalable, and compliant.
* Automated workflows embedded, reducing manual work and error rates.
* A unified and colleague-friendly global service portal live.
* Secure integrations with HRIS, Payroll, and Finance in place.
* Knowledge base and self-service content available globally.


**Additional Information**

**WHO WE ARE** 
 ​
   

  





 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 ​We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





**​WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE** 
 ​
   

  





 We offer all our employees at H&M Group attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online. Brands covered by the discount are H&M (Beauty and Move included), COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories, ARKET. In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.
   

  





 In addition to our global benefits, all our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. Please note that they may differ between employment type and countries.
   

  





**JOIN US​** 
  

  





 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​
   

  





 ​Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​
   

  





 ​
 *\*We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.​*

title: Infrastructure Engineer_Microsoft & Cloud
description:
Infrastructure Engineer – Microsoft & Cloud, konsult uppdrag
   

  

 Hej!
   

  

 Hoppas att allt är bra med dig? Jag har idag fått in en spännande roll till min kund i Solna. Skicka din kandidat med CV i wordformat, tillgänglighet samt ert timpris som inte kan överstiga det angivna nedan, ett extra plus om ni kan dra ner på det ytterligare.
   

 Mycket bra, rolig kund som jag fått förmånen att arbeta tillsammans med under alla mina år på Randstad och där jag har 2 bef konsulter redan.
   

  

 Uppdragsstart: Mitten på maj
   

 Uppdragslängd: Tom 2026-12-31, ev längre
   

 Placeringsort: Solna, samt distans vissa dgr
   

  

 Språk: Måste kunna kommunicera väl på svenska i både tal och skrift, svenskt bolag men engelska viktigt också då IT sitter utspridda i andra länder inom Europa.
   

  

  

 Rollbeskrivning
   

 Konsulten ska arbeta operativt och rådgivande med design, implementering, drift och vidareutveckling av Microsoftbaserad ITinfrastruktur, både onprem och i Azure.
   

 Rollen kräver hög självständighet, god dokumentationsförmåga och vana att arbeta enligt etablerade säkerhets- och styrningsprinciper.
   

  

 Obligatoriska krav
   

 Entra ID (identitet och åtkomst)
   

  Praktisk erfarenhet av säkerhetskonfiguration i Entra ID
   

  

  Erfarenhet av:
   

 o Conditional Accesspolicyer för olika risk- och åtkomstscenarier
   

 o MFAstrategier, inklusive passwordlesslösningar (FIDO2, passkeys, Windows Hello for Business)
   

 o Privileged Identity Management (PIM) för roller och åtkomst
   

 o Rollbaserad åtkomststyrning (RBAC) enligt PoLP
   

  Hantering av externa användare (B2B) och gästpolicyer
   

  Erfarenhet av incident och åtkomstgranskning via signin logs och audit logs
   

  

 Azure och molninfrastruktur
   

  Praktisk erfarenhet av Microsoft Azure i produktionsmiljö
   

  Erfarenhet av:
   

 o Azure Landing Zone enligt Microsofts referensarkitektur
   

 o Management Groups, subscriptions, RBAC och policyer
   

 o Nätverk (VNET, peering, VPN, ExpressRoute, AppGW, Load Balancers)
   

  Erfarenhet av Infrastructure as Code (IaC), exempelvis:
   

 o Bicep
   

 o Terraform (meriterande)
   

  

 Intune och klienthantering
   

  Erfarenhet av Microsoft Intune (Endpoint Manager)
   

  Hantering av:
   

 o Windows 11
   

 o Konfigurationsprofiler, efterlevnadspolicys och säkerhetsbaselines
   

 o Applikationsdistribution och uppdateringar
   

  Konfiguration och förvaltning av säkerhetsrelaterade Intunepolicyer
   

  Erfarenhet av:
   

 o Compliancepolicys och device healthbaserade krav
   

 o Säkerhetsbaselines för Windows
   

 o Endpoint securitypolicyer (attack surface reduction, firewall, disk
   

 encryption)
   

  

  Integrering av Intune med Conditional Access (device trustscenarier)
   

  Hantering av olika enhetstyper och ägandemodeller
   

  Förståelse för livscykelhantering ur säkerhetsperspektiv (onboarding, förändring, offboarding)
   

  

 Windowsbaserad infrastruktur (onprem)
   

  Erfarenhet av klassisk Windowsmiljö:
   

 o Active Directory Domain Services
   

 o DNS, DHCP, GPO
   

  Erfarenhet av Active Directory Certificate Services (AD CS):
   

 o Grundläggande design och förvaltning av intern PKI
   

 o Hantering av certifikatmallar, utfärdande och livscykel
   

 o Förståelse för användning av certifikat för autentisering
   

  Felsökning och livscykelhantering av Windows Server
   

  Integration mellan onprem AD och Entra ID (Entra Connect)
   

  

 PowerShell
   

  Mycket goda kunskaper i PowerShell
   

  Erfarenhet av:
   

 o Automatisering av administrativa uppgifter
   

 o Skript för Azure, Entra ID, Intune och Windows Server
   

 o Strukturering, felhantering och versionshantering av script
   

  

 Virtuell desktopinfrastruktur (VDI/DaaS)
   

  Erfarenhet av design, implementering, drift och förvaltning av virtuella
   

 desktoplösningar i produktionsmiljö
   

  Praktisk erfarenhet av en eller flera plattformar, exempelvis:
   

 o Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops
   

 o Azure Virtual Desktop (AVD)
   

 o Windows 365
   

  Förståelse för olika leveransmodeller:
   

 o Sessionbaserade och personliga desktops
   

 o Applikationspublicering kontra full desktop
   

  Kunskap om arkitektur, kapacitetsplanering och prestanda i VDImiljöer
   

  Erfarenhet av imagehantering, uppdatering och livscykelhantering
   

  Integration med identitets- och åtkomsttjänster:
   

 o Active Directory och Entra ID
   

 o Conditional Access, MFA och devicebaserade åtkomstkrav
   

 o Citrix Federated Authentication Service (FAS)
   

  Erfarenhet av användarprofilhantering och policystyrning
   

  Felsökning av anslutning, prestanda och användarupplevelse
   

  Förståelse för säkerhet, åtkomst och dataskydd i virtuella arbetsplatslösningar
   

  

 Meriterande krav
   

  Erfarenhet av hybridmiljöer (onprem + Azure)
   

  Erfarenhet av säkerhetsrelaterade funktioner:
   

 o Privileged Identity Management (PIM)
   

 o Passwordless, MFA, device trust
   

  Dokumentation i exempelvis Wiki, Markdown eller Gitbaserade plattformar
   

  Erfarenhet av större organisationer med tydlig governance och processkrav
   

  

 Personliga egenskaper
   

  Självständig och strukturerad
   

  God kommunikationsförmåga, både tekniskt och verksamhetsnära
   

  Förmåga att följa och upprätthålla etablerade processer
   

  Van att arbeta med säkerhet, risk och efterlevnad som grundkrav
   

  

 Språk
   

  Svenska och engelska i tal och skrift

title: Junior Consultant
description:
*Are you interested in helping ambitious companies grow through organic marketing, and are you motivated by building and maintaining strong customer relationships?*
*We are looking for a new Junior Consultant for our Client Management team in Stockholm, maybe you are the one we are looking for?*
**About Us**
 Bonzer is a specialized SEO (Search Engine Optimization) agency helping businesses grow their online presence across Google and AI search platforms like ChatGPT and Copilot. We’re experts in tailoring organic growth strategies that combine strong SEO fundamentals with the latest developments in search and AI technology - always aligned with each client’s unique goals and ambitions.
   

  

**The role**
 As our new Junior Consultant in Client Management, you will be responsible for building and maintaining strong relationships with our clients with the aim of contributing to their success. You will be a valuable part of the team, providing support, analysis, and delivery of our product, while also having the opportunity to work on various projects and develop essential practical skills.
   

  

 Together with dedicated colleagues, you will help our customers improve their marketing and customer acquisition strategies through organic marketing within both AI-search and traditional search on the Swedish market, as well as internationally.
   

  

 In the Junior role, we do not expect you to work independently from the start, but we do expect you to deliver strong results with the support of experienced colleagues and consultants.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 We imagine that you are a recent graduate or at the beginning of your career - preferably with a background in marketing, communication, sales, business, entrepreneurship, or similar areas.
   

  

 Experience with SEO is not a requirement, but we do want to see that you have a willingness to learn, a curious approach, and a passion for the marketing industry. We will ensure that you receive the right support and training to succeed in the role.
   

  

 We emphasise that you thrive in a dynamic work environment where no two days are the same. As a consultant, you play a central role in building strong relationships, as a large part of the work involves close customer contact. That is why we are looking for an outgoing person with good communication skills who can navigate a varied and customer-driven workday. In addition, you are motivated by working with people and have a natural ability to build trust and long-lasting relationships. You are able to understand customer needs and translate them into value-creating solutions.
   

  

 We are proud of our employees and the culture we create together. That is why we are looking for new colleagues who thrive in a collaborative environment, value community, and share the same values as us, so that together we can strengthen each other and the company.
   

  

 We value your character and teamwork above all, and we’ll equip you with the SEO knowledge to build a strong career with us.. In addition, you must be a resident of Sweden and fluent in Swedish, as the role is based at our Stockholm office. Fluency in English is also required, as it is our primary working language across markets.
   

  

**Benefits Of The Job**
* Gain valuable insight and experience in the AI development and SEO
* In the role of junior consultant, you will have the opportunity to take on responsibility, which involves independent tasks that contribute to your professional and personal development.
* Work closely with experienced and specialized professionals in the industry.
* Rapid development opportunities.
* Opportunity for mentorship and skills development
* Become part of an international company in the Scandinavian markets (Denmark & Norway).
* Become a part of a strong team culture with regular events and activities that bring colleagues together.
* Be part of Bonzer - a growing team of 50 passionate specialists working together to create impact.


**Recruitment process**
 If you are interested in the role of Junior Consultant in our Client Management department at Bonzer, please upload your CV and a short cover letter.
   

  

 We will get back to you directly if we see a potential match and invite you to a short introductory interview.
   

  

**The Recruitment Process Consists Of The Following Steps**
* First interview
* Second interview with case.
* Last interview.


 We look forward to receiving your application!
   

  

 Best regards, Team Bonzer

title: Security Engineer to Mainframe Security team | SEB, Sweden
description:
Join our innovative Mainframe Security team in Solna, where we're modernizing a vital platform and driving key security initiatives. Be part of a progressive tech company shaping the future of financial security.
   

  

 SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fueled by collaboration. From Java to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you'll be interested in this opportunity!
   

  

**About the role:**
 Join our Mainframe Security team, a vital part of SEB Technology in Solna, Stockholm. We're actively modernizing this critical platform, driving numerous security initiatives. You'll focus on authentication and authorization, installing, configuring tools, and designing solutions for sysprog teams and mainframe users. The role also includes developing and managing various programs and scripts, plus testing solutions for new products and changes, collaborating with other teams.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Proven experience with mainframe platforms and security.
* Strong background in authentication and authorization principles and tools.
* Adept at installing, configuring, and designing robust security solutions.
* Experience in developing and managing programs and scripts relevant to mainframe environments.
* Excellent collaboration skills for testing and developing solutions with various teams.


**What we offer:**
* Agile and modern ways of working
* A flat hierarchy and openness to share ideas, opinions and points of views
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* Innovative company at the forefront of technology
* Numerous examples of innovative initiatives such as Innovation Hubs, SEBx, Ted Talks, Design Sprint Week etc.


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from. Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-04-07. If you have questions about the position, please contact Anneli Risberg, anneli.risberg@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 https://sebgroup.com/career https://bit.ly/SEBcareer
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which is why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

title: IT Auditor | SEB, Stockholm
description:
Do you have a passion for technology and security? Would you like to support SEB's ambitious digitalisation journey by helping to navigate the ever-evolving threat landscape? Then you should join our dedicated and qualified technology audit team.
   

  

 This role sits within Group Internal Audit (GIA) which is an independent group-wide function with a global presence, comprising approximately 90 auditors. We evaluate and give assurance on the governance, risk management and internal control framework of SEB and report directly to the Audit and Compliance Committee (ACC) of the Board. The global technology audit team comprise of six colleagues in Sweden and three in the Baltics.
   

  

 What you will be doing
   

  

 As a member of our team, you will assess SEB's risk exposure related to technology and security and contribute to the development of our audit strategy. You need to stay on top of the threat landscape, the regulatory environment, and how new technologies, new ways of working and a growing ecosystem is altering SEB's risk posture. You will also use your skills and creativity to develop and deploy smart ways of testing controls and deliver top-quality audit work, e.g. using AI and data analytics.
   

  

 You will participate in and lead audit assignments in areas such as cyber security, technical resilience, and data management, spanning governance and operational processes, technology platforms, business applications, third-party service providers, and more. You will assist other teams within Group Internal Audit to identify and assess technology related risk within business processes and perform integrated audit assignments. You will also provide guidance and support to the organisation in the implementation and enhancement of controls. The team has a global reach, so occasional travelling is part of the job.
   

  

 Who we are looking for
   

  

 You have a genuine interest and proficiency in technology, cyber security and risk management. You could either have a technical or auditor background, working in roles such as solution architect, senior developer, IT security officer, internal/external auditor, or similar. Experience from a Big4 audit firm, exposure to the financial industry, and hands-on experience as a developer or technician is meriting. You are eager to learn and continuously develop, and either possess or are willing earn relevant certifications, such as CISA, CISSP, CISM, etc.
   

  

 Ideally you have experience in one or more of the following areas:
   

  

* IT audit, security testing, risk management or similar
* IT governance, development, and operational processes
* Cloud technology and security
* Programming and scripting
* Third party risk management
* Data management and Artificial Intelligence
* Technology and security risk assessment
* Industry standards such as ISO27k, ISF SoGP, CIS18, NIST CSF, COBIT, etc.


 You have a MSc or BSc degree in the IT field, or equivalent experience, and have proven skills in professional English report writing.
   

  

 Finally, you are dedicated, curious and self-propelled in your assignments. You are a team player but can deliver independently on time and scope with minimum supervision. You are structured and have strong project and time management skills. You are also an excellent communicator with the ability to build trust and relationships at all levels in the technology and business organisations.
   

  

 What we offer
   

  

* Innovative company in forefront of technology
* Flexible and empowering work environment
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* International opportunities and working environment
* Friendly and welcoming culture


 Do you want to be a part of SEB?
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than January 30, 2026. If you have questions about the position, please contact recruiting manager Martin Aronsson, martin.aronsson@seb.se but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and criminal records checks. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks.
   

  

 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Learn more about working at SEB on our Career website or through our Career podcasts:
   

  

 https://sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 https://bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: AI Engineer
description:
Uppdraget omfattar djup specialistkompetens inom träning, anpassning och finjustering av stora språkmodeller (LLMs), i kombination med mjukvaruutveckling baserad på generativ AI och tillhörande teknikekosystem.
 



  





 Konsulten kan antingen bidra med spetskompetens inom området eller fungera som resursförstärkning i ett befintligt team. Uppdragsgivaren ansvarar för den dagliga ledningen, inklusive planering och genomförande av arbetet.
 



  





 Uppdragets innehåll
 



 Du kommer att arbeta med att utveckla och implementera anpassade språkmodeller för att stödja affärskritiska processer där generella modeller inte är tillräckliga. Fokus ligger på fine‑tuning av öppna LLM:er samt möjliggörande av körning i edge‑miljöer med begränsade resurser och höga krav på säkerhet.
 



 Arbetet bygger vidare på tidigare erfarenheter inom modell‑fine‑tuning, reinforcement learning och verktyg för dynamiska arbetsflöden.
 



  





 Exempel på arbetsuppgifter
 


* Utföra supervised fine‑tuning av utvalda LLM:er mot specifik domän‑ och uppgiftsdata
* Optimera modeller för edge‑miljöer med hjälp av CUDA, Docker samt kvantiserings‑ och pruning‑tekniker
* Utvärdera och jämföra modellprestanda mot basmodeller med relevanta benchmarks och interna testset
* Utveckla en robust pipeline för edge‑deployment (t.ex. Docker‑baserad och CUDA‑optimerad) som möjliggör inferens på resursbegränsade enheter
* Samarbeta med domänexperter för insamling och förberedelse av träningsdata samt definiera relevanta KPI:er
* Dokumentera metodik, kod och resultat på ett strukturerat och återanvändbart sätt för framtida projekt



  





 Kompetenskrav
 


* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av fine‑tuning och reinforcement learning av stora språkmodeller
* Mycket goda kunskaper i Python, PyTorch, LoRA samt ML‑verktyg som Jupyter Notebook
* Praktisk erfarenhet av CI/CD‑flöden, Git, Docker och CUDA‑baserad acceleration
* God förståelse för edge‑deployment, modelloptimering och säkerhetsaspekter i produktionsmiljöer
* Förmåga att dokumentera kod, experiment och resultat enligt best practice
* Mycket god kommunikations‑ och samarbetsförmåga



  





**Uppdragsinformation** 




 Plats: Stockholm
 



 Start: Så snart som möjligt
 



 Omfattning: 100 %
 



  





**Kontakt** 




 För frågor om uppdraget, kontakta ansvarig Business Manager,
 **Joanna Nyström @** 
 joanna.nystrom@akkodisgroup.com
 



  





**Om Akkodis** 




 På Akkodis är du som konsult vår högsta prioritet. Vi stöttar dig i din karriärutveckling och erbjuder uppdrag i olika branscher, system och miljöer. Du omfattas av kollektivavtal, försäkringar, friskvårdsbidrag och rabatter på träningskort. Vi ordnar regelbundet sociala aktiviteter och arbetar tillsammans för att skapa framtidens lösningar inom IT och Engineering.

title: Systemförvaltare Tid och Lön
description:
Trivs du i gränslandet mellan teknik, verksamhet och processutveckling? Vill du bidra till utvecklingen av KTH:s HR-system i en komplex och samhällsviktig miljö? KTH söker en systemförvaltare med helhetssyn som vill vara med och utveckla, förvalta och förbättra KTH:s HR-system med fokus på WFM-system.
   

  

 Arbetsuppgifter
   

  

 Som systemförvaltare på KTH kommer du tillsammans med dina kollegor och i enlighet med KTH:s förvaltningsmodell att arbeta med utveckling, förvaltning och avveckling av system som används inom inom HR.
   

  

 Ditt huvudsakliga förvaltningsansvar är KTH:s WFM-system som kallas "Egenrapporteringen", som är en del av vårt tids- och lönesystem. Förvaltningen sker i nära samarbete med de andra systemförvaltarna för HR+ och Medvind.
   

  

**Arbetet Innebär Att**
* Säkerställa systemens kvalitet, tillgänglighet och användbarhet genom löpande förvaltning, användarsupport och utbildning av användare
* Bidra till ett helhetsperspektiv på HR:s systemlandskap samt samverka med kollegor inom HR, IT och andra delar av KTH.
* Leda och/eller delta i förändrings- och utvecklingsprojekt av varierande omfattning.
* Utföra visst löpande operativt arbete inom HR-området.


 Rollen ställer krav på nyfikenhet och förmåga att sätta sig in i systemens olika delar, med förståelse för såväl detaljer som helhet, integrationer och samband.
   

  

**Om avdelningen/gruppen**
 Som systemförvaltare ingår du i funktionen för HR-system, som består av åtta medarbetare. Gruppen ansvarar för förvaltning och utveckling av KTH:s HR-system och arbetar i nära samverkan med kollegor inom HR, IT och andra delar av organisationen. Här präglas arbetet av kunskapsdelning och ett gemensamt fokus för att utveckla effektiva och hållbara systemstöd.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer
   

  

**Krav**
* Högskoleutbildning med inriktning mot HR eller system, alternativt annan utbildning eller erfarenhet som arbetsgivaren bedömer som likvärdig.
* Flerårig, dokumenterad erfarenhet av att framgångsrikt förvalta och vidareutveckla WFM-system som en integrerad del av ett personal- och lönesystem, gärna från en större och komplex organisation.
* Du har dokumenterad erfarenhet av löneadministrativt arbete.
* Du har förståelse för förvaltningsmodeller och systemlivscykelhantering.


**För Att Lyckas i Rollen Ser Vi Att**
* Du ser helheter och har förmågan att omvandla dagligt operativt arbete till långsiktigt strategiskt resultat.
* Du arbetar resultat- och leveransfokuserat.
* Du har förmåga att arbeta självständigt och att samarbeta väl i grupp.
* Du har hög servicekänsla, arbetar pedagogiskt samt projektorienterat.
* Du har goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift, då rollen innebär arbete i en internationell miljö.


**Meriterande**
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av offentlig förvaltning eller statlig verksamhet och gärna högskolesektorn.
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av WFM-systemet Medvind och/eller HR- och lönesystemet HR+.


 Vi kommer att lägga stor vikt vid personliga egenskaper.
   

  

 Bli en del av KTH
   

  

 KTH formar framtiden genom utbildning, forskning och innovation. Som ett ledande internationellt tekniskt universitet spelar vi en aktiv roll i att driva och medverka i omställningen till ett hållbart samhälle. Här erbjuds du möjligheten att växa och utvecklas på en kreativ och dynamisk arbetsplats med goda arbetsvillkor och förmåner. Jämställdhet, mångfald och lika villkor är en kvalitetsfråga och en självklar del av KTH:s värdegrund som universitet och statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Läs mer om våra förmåner och hur det är att arbeta och utvecklas på KTH.
   

  

 Fackliga representanter
   

  

 Kontaktuppgifter till fackliga representanter.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 Du ansöker via KTH:s rekryteringssystem. Du som sökande har ansvaret för att din ansökan är komplett när den skickas in och att de kvalifikationer vi efterfrågar i annonsen framgår i ditt CV.
   

  

 I denna rekrytering söker du endast med ditt CV. Istället för ett personligt brev kommer du i rekryteringssystemet att få besvara en eller flera frågor. Det är viktigt att du besvarar frågorna noggrant och sanningsenligt, för att vi ska få en tydlig bild av din kompetens och erfarenhet. Vi baserar vårt urval på kvalifikationerna som framgår av annonsen.
   

  

 Ansökan ska vara KTH tillhanda senast sista ansökningsdagen vid midnatt, CET/CEST (CentralEuropean Time/Central European Summer Time).
   

  

 Om anställningen
   

  

 Anställningen gäller tillsvidare enligt avtal.
   

  

 Anställningen inleds med sex månaders provanställning.
   

  

 Övrigt
   

  

 För information om behandling av personuppgifter i samband med rekrytering.
   

  

 Det kan förekomma att en anställning hos KTH är placerad i säkerhetsklass. Om så är fallet för just denna anställning görs en säkerhetsprövning av sökande i enlighet med säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) efter samtycke. I dessa fall är en förutsättning för anställning att sökande blir godkänd efter säkerhetsprövning.
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt försäljare av platsannonser.

title: Electrical Engineer, Data Center Construction and Design
description:
Note: Google's hybrid workplace includes remote and in-office roles. By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
   

  

**In-office locations: Stockholm, Sweden.**
**Remote location(s): Sweden.** 
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in Electrical, Mechanical, Industrial, or Construction Engineering or equivalent practical experience.
* 3 years of experience in design development of electrical power distribution and data center infrastructure products.
* 3 years of experience with Electrical Engineering for construction projects in a data center colocation facility.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience managing vendor relationships, with an understanding of standard practices in the design and construction industry.
* Experience working with data center equipment/environments (including switchgear, generators, controls, security monitoring systems, fire safety systems), with an understanding of start up/commissioning processes.
* Experience managing construction projects within an international working environment.
* Ability to travel 15% of the time as needed.


**About The Job**
 Our thirst for technology is a part of everything we do. The Data Center Engineering team takes the physical design of our data centers into the future. Our lab mirrors a research and development department -- cutting-edge strategies are born, tested and tested again. Along with a team of great minds, you take on complex topics like how we use power or how to run state-of-the-art, environmentally-friendly facilities. You're a visionary who optimizes for efficiencies and never stops seeking improvements -- even small changes that can make a huge impact. You generate ideas, communicate recommendations to senior-level executives and drive implementation alongside facilities technicians.
   

  

 Electrical Engineering support supporting the delivery of the projects in line with the schedule, cost, quality and safety requirements.
   

  

 In this role, you will serve as the primary contact between Google, the Program Management Consultancy (PMC) and Specialist Contractors, and coordinate with PMC owners representatives. Their primary focus is to protect Google's interests by developing an understanding of the project delivery details and using their experience in the construction space and knowledge of the specific project, elevating the performance of other project stakeholders through active management.
   

  

 Behind everything our users see online is the architecture built by the Technical Infrastructure team to keep it running. From developing and maintaining our data centers to building the next generation of Google platforms, we make Google's product portfolio possible. We're proud to be our engineers' engineers and love voiding warranties by taking things apart so we can rebuild them. We keep our networks up and running, ensuring our users have the best and fastest experience possible.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Act as the lead electrical subject matter expert, providing technical leadership to resolve critical field issues and troubleshooting advanced system events.
* Support program managers and coordinate with contractors, vendors, and authorities to ensure projects are delivered safely, on schedule, and within budget.
* Provide technical leadership to the projects, support and optimise project design, scope, schedule, quality, commissioning and safety for electrical discipline. Provide feedback to the central partner teams on possible improvements.
* Drive project electrical outcomes of high complexity and scope as a key contributor, integrating feedback from multiple stakeholders, when necessary.
* Contribute to and review the quality and commissioning plans for the electrical discipline. Support electrically relevant Factory Acceptance Tests (FAT) and all off and on site commissioning.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

title: Service Management Project Manager
description:
RED now has a new contract opportunity for an
 ***SAP Service Management Lead***
 to join one of our key partners for an
 ***ECC-S4 HANA transformation***
 . The initial contract will be for
 ***8 months***
 with possible extension.
 



  





 This contract is to start
 ***ASAP***
 and will be remote in Europe.
 



  





 About role:
 



  





 You will act as the authoritative bridge between business and IT, translating S/4HANA Service Management architecture into detailed operational designs while overseeing data migration, stakeholder relationships, and end-to-end process validation to ensure the business process transformation aligns with the target solution.
 



  





 Specific skills/experience required:
 


* 5+ years of SAP lead experience
* Strong leadership and stakeholder management experience
* Background with modules CS/EAM/PM/SM
* ECC-S4 HANA transformation experience
* Familiarity with utilities or similar industry
* Excellent communication skills with English (Swedish is a bonus!)
* Able to join ASAP or within 10 days from offer



  





  





**Please send an updated CV in Word format with availability and rate to jisaksen@redglobal.com.** 
 We also pay a referral fee for any successful recommendations.
 



  





 Best,

title: Systemtekniker inom databaser (SQL Server)
description:
Om jobbet
   

  

 Nu söker vi en systemtekniker till ett vikariat inom vårt databasteam. Rollen passar dig som vill utvecklas inom databasområdet och arbeta med SQL Server i stora och komplexa IT-miljöer där stabilitet, tillgänglighet och säker drift är avgörande.
   

  

 Du arbetar nära erfarna kollegor med drift, underhåll och vidareutveckling av våra databasmiljöer. Rollen ger dig möjlighet att bygga värdefull erfarenhet inom SQL Server och utveckla din kompetens inom databaser i stora och komplexa IT-miljöer.
   

  

**Exempel På Arbetsuppgifter**
* Drift och underhåll av befintliga databaser och miljöer
* Uppgraderingar och livscykelhantering av databaser
* Implementationer, migreringar och tekniskt stöd i projekt
* Felsökning och problemlösning i komplexa miljöer
* Performance monitoring och trendanalyser
* Utveckling och förbättring av driftrutiner
* Automation av återkommande och rutinbaserade aktiviteter


 Du blir en del av en verksamhet där databaserna är en viktig del av den tekniska infrastrukturen och där arbetet präglas av samarbete, kunskapsdelning och långsiktig utveckling.
   

  

 Kvalifikationer
   

  

 Vi söker dig som har
   

  

* högskoleutbildning eller annan eftergymnasial utbildning inom IT, alternativt annan utbildning i kombination med erfarenhet som vi bedömer likvärdig
* erfarenhet av arbete inom IT-drift
* goda kunskaper i svenska i tal och skrift.


 Det är meriterande om du har
   

  

* erfarenhet av SQL Server ur ett drift- eller utvecklingsperspektiv
* arbetat som DBA eller nära databasinfrastruktur
* erfarenhet av automation eller scripting.


**Vem är du?**
 För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du är nyfiken och vill utvecklas tekniskt. Du tycker om att lösa problem och har tålamod att felsöka även när det är komplext.
   

  

 Du är också lyhörd och prestigelös i samarbetet med andra. Rollen innebär kontakt med olika delar av verksamheten, vilket gör att du behöver kunna ta instruktioner, dra nytta av andras kompetens och hantera situationer där tempot eller kraven ibland är höga. Du har förmågan att skilja på sak och person och behåller ett professionellt bemötande även i utmanande situationer.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Möjliga placeringsorter för den här tjänsten är Göteborg eller Borlänge.
   

  

 Tjänsten är ett vikariat fram till årsskiftet.
   

  

 Ansökan
   

  

 För att undvika att du missar viktig information om din ansökan behöver du se till att hålla dig uppdaterad via "Min karriärsida"! Vi använder främst mail (från mejladress: noreply@heroma.se) för att göra utskick och kallelser. Kolla din inkorg och även skräppost/SPAM regelbundet under denna tid för att vara säker på att du får all information från oss!
   

  

 I denna rekrytering används webbaserade tester som en del i urvalet. De frågor som du får besvara när du skickar in din ansökan kommer att ligga till grund för det första urvalet vi gör. Om det inte står något annat i annonsen vill vi att du bifogar ditt CV. Vi har slutat begära in personligt brev eftersom vi inte har med det som del av urvalsunderlaget. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ska du kontakta ansvarig chef för rekryteringen så att din ansökan blir hanterad enligt särskilda rutiner. Du hittar namn och kontaktuppgifter till chefen i annonsen.
   

  

 Inom vår IT-organisation är du med och utvecklar Sverige med hjälp av moderna och innovativa lösningar. Vi är mitt i en spännande förändring där vi försöker ta vara på digitaliseringens möjligheter till fullo. Digitaliseringen ställer allt större krav och vi vill därför anpassa oss vad gäller kompetens, arbetssätt och organisation i takt med utvecklingen. Vi har ett helhetsansvar för IT och telekom, en verksamhet som pågår dygnet runt, året om - precis som Sveriges transportsystem.
   

  

 På Trafikverket jobbar vi med att göra Sverige närmare. Vi tror på att en förening av olika erfarenheter, bakgrunder och perspektiv är den bästa grunden för att bygga en arbetsplats fri från diskriminering och en miljö där alla trivs och gör sitt bästa. Vi tror på mångfald där den gemensamma nämnaren är pålitlighet, engagemang och mod. För det är så vi bäst representerar vårt samhälle.
   

  

 Sök tjänsten

title: Junior Information Security Officer
description:
**WHO WE ARE** 





 At Trustly, we're building a smarter, faster, and more secure financial future by revolutionizing the world of payments. As a global leader in Open Banking Payments, we are establishing Pay by Bank as the new standard at checkout, providing unparalleled freedom, speed, and ease to millions of consumers and merchants worldwide.
 




  






 Our Ambition: To build the world’s most disruptive payment network and redefine what the payment experience should feel like.
 




  






 Trustly is a global team of innovators, collaborators, and doers.  If you are driven by a strong sense of purpose and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial, and high-growth environment, join us and be part of a team that’s transforming the way the world pays.
 




  




**ABOUT THE TEAM** 
  


 The Security team is Trustly's first line of defence. We do the hands-on security work - running risk assessments, reviewing vendors, maintaining policies and procedures, driving business continuity and disaster recovery, and making sure security is embedded in how Trustly builds and operates its products. We work closely with engineering, legal, finance, risk & compliance, HR and senior leadership, and partner with the second line for governance and oversight.
 


  

**ABOUT THE ROLE** 
  


 We are looking for a Junior Information Security Officer to join the Information Security team, reporting to the Director of Security in Stockholm. The role sits in the first line of defence, meaning you will be hands-on with security work - executing risk assessments, vendor reviews and compliance activities rather than overseeing them from a distance.
 


  


 This is a great role for someone early in their security career who wants to build broad experience across governance, risk management, compliance and operations in a regulated payments environment. You will support the team across its full scope of work, learn fast, contribute from day one, and grow into increasing independence over time.
 




  




**What you'll do** 
  

  
* Support the development and maintenance of Trustly's information security framework (ISMS), including drafting and updating instructions and routines
  
* Conduct information security risk assessments and help maintain the risk register
  
* Perform security assessments of third-party vendors and partners as part of onboarding and ongoing oversight
  
* Support business continuity, disaster recovery and crisis management activities, including planning and testing
  
* Assist in maintaining security controls across areas such as access management, internal fraud prevention, monitoring and segregation of duties
  
* Support compliance activities, including preparation for audits and certifications
  
* Respond to customer due diligence requests and security questionnaires
  
* Contribute to security awareness initiatives, training materials and internal communications
  
* Help track incidents, audit findings and remediation activities to ensure timely resolution
  

  


  


  




**Who you are** 
  

  
* 1 - 3 years of experience in information security, IT risk, compliance or a related field; Internship or graduate experience counts
  
* Foundational understanding of information security principles and familiarity with frameworks such as ISO/IEC 27001 or NIST CSF
  
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in English - you can write clearly and explain security concepts to a non-technical audience
  
* Analytical and structured in your approach to work, with attention to detail
  
* Curious and eager to learn - you want to understand how regulations, risk and technology connect in practice
  
* Comfortable working across teams and asking good questions
  
* Working towards or holding a relevant certification (CISM, ISO 27001 Lead Implementer, CISA, CISSP or similar) is a plus but not required
  
* Fluent in English, written and spoken; Swedish is a bonus but not a requirement
  

  


  





  




  


**Our Fantastic Benefits**

 (varies by location)
 




 🌴
 **20 to 30 days of holiday** 
 to support a healthy work-life balance
 



 🥳
 **Monthly team outing allowance** 
 to enjoy social events with your colleagues
 



 👶
 **Parental leave top-up** 
 additional support for new parents
 



 🥐
 **Daily breakfast and on-site perks** 
 to make your workday smoother
 



 💚
 **Well being support** 
 our health allowance covers gym memberships, massages, and much more to help you feel your best
 



**PLUS** 
 additional benefits designed to enhance your work-life experience!
 



  





**Shape Your Role and Make an Impact**




 Join a dynamic environment where you can take ownership, drive change, and continuously embrace new challenges. We’re looking for dedicated and highly motivated individuals who thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy collaborating across different areas of the organisation.
 



 If your skills and experience align with this role, we’d love to hear from you!
 **Apply now and submit your CV in English.** 



  


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Cobol Developer | SEB, Stockholm or Eskilstuna
description:
Are you ready to innovate with COBOL, contributing to the modernization of core mainframe systems? Join us to develop and manage SEB's critical systems, shaping the future of finance.
   

  

 SEB is more than just a bank with an IT function. We are a progressive tech company powered by innovation and fuelled by collaboration. From COBOL to AI and everything in between, we offer you an impressive tech stack and several technology paths. Together we're innovating for a sustainable society and building the tech arena of the future, a welcoming space for everyone. Are you ready to take on a new challenge? If so, you'll be interested in this opportunity!
   

  

**About the role:**
 In this role, you will be instrumental in developing and managing SEB’s IPS solution - individual pension saving. We seek a passionate individual keen on COBOL programming. You will actively contribute to the modernization of the mainframe for IPS. This is a unique opportunity to shape critical financial infrastructure.
   

  

 Our mainframe systems are important to be able to enable speed and quality in IT delivery for large parts of our business areas. You will be part of a team of 3 people who work with cobol development, a scum master and a tester; and is led by a Product Owner. The team works closely with the business, specifically the Business Services area, where the customers' needs and wishes are in focus.
   

  

 Since part of the team is based in Eskilstuna, this role may be based in Eskilstuna or Stockholm.
   

  

**Who are you?**
 To thrive and succeed in your role with us, you are customer- and business-oriented and enjoy working in a team. You are committed and work in a structured way with a good delivery ability. As a person, you are driven, innovative and have a changing mindset to add greater customer value. You are positive and clear in your communication and are happy to share your knowledge.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Strong experience in COBOL programming.
* Proven track record working with mainframe systems.
* Eagerness to contribute to modernization initiatives.
* Collaborative mindset and excellent problem-solving skills.
* Experience working in an agile way


**What we offer:**
* Agile and modern ways of working
* A flat hierarchy and openness to share ideas, opinions and points of views
* Extensive training and learning opportunities
* Work-life balance
* Hybrid work model, meaning remote work is possible up to 2 days/week


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from.
   

  

 Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 2026-05-17. If you have questions about the position, please contact Malena Langley, malena.langley@seb.se, note that we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and history of crime. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, which means that this position might be covered by internal redeployment.
   

  

**Learn more about working at SEB** 
 on our Career website or through our Career podcasts.
   

  

 sebgroup.com/career
   

  

 bit.ly/SEBcareer

title: Administratör- Vårdens IT till Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset
description:
Vi söker dig som är en strukturerad, flexibel och serviceinriktad administratör och vill arbeta med fakturering, planering, ekonomi- och övrig administration av Vårdens IT. Du blir en viktig del i en dynamisk organisation med högt driv, varierande arbetsuppgifter och breda kontaktytor.
   

  

**Du erbjuds**
* Att delta i utvecklingen ett nytt uppdrag för Vårdens IT som innefattar samordning, utveckling och förvaltning av vårdens gemensamma IT-system i Region Stockholm
* Ett spännande arbete på ett av världens främsta sjukhus
* En miljö där vi hjälps åt, vi ser och bekräftar varandra och vi tror på en inkluderande arbetsmiljö där vi bidrar till varandras utveckling


 Självklart får du också ta del av våra generella förmåner som Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset erbjuder dig.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 I rollen ansvarar du för löpande fakturahantering och administration kopplat till Karolinskas tillkommande uppdrag Vårdens IT. Du stöttar chefer och projektledare med att upprätthålla processer och utförande av fakturering, rekrytering och uppföljning, samt bidrar med projektadministration. Arbetet omfattar både dagliga rutiner, utvecklingsarbete och ad hoc-uppgifter.
   

  

 Rollen innebär många kontaktytor, både internt och externt. Du arbetar i en verksamhet som snabbt anpassar sig efter IT- och sjukhusets behov, vilket ställer krav på flexibilitet och förmåga att hantera förändring.
   

  

**Dina Huvudsakliga Arbetsuppgifter**
* Löpande fakturahantering
* Stöd till chefer och projektledare och controllers i uppföljningsarbete
* Stöd till chefer i rekrytering- och onboarding-processer
* Administration kring tidsrapportering i projekt, avtal, diarieföring mm.
* Utveckling och förbättring av arbetsflöden


**Vi söker dig som**
* Är noggrann, strukturerad och trivs i ett högt tempo
* Har god samarbetsförmåga och ett serviceinriktat arbetssätt
* Är självgående, ansvarstagande och lösningsorienterad
* Har lätt för att prioritera
* Är kommunikativ, pedagogisk och har tålamod
* Tar initiativ och vill utvecklas inom ditt område


**Kvalifikationer**
**Krav**
* Minst 2 års relevant arbetslivserfarenhet ( administration, projektledning, chefsassistent, koordinator)
* Goda kunskaper i Excel och övriga MS Office
* Minst gymnasial utbildning
* God kommunikativ förmåga i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet av administration av rekrytering, onboarding
* Erfarenhet bokföring
* Erfarenhet projekthantering


**Om rekryteringsprocessen**
 Urval och intervjuer kan komma att ske löpande under ansökningstiden.
   

  

 I samband med din ansökan behöver du bifoga CV. Istället för ett personligt brev ber vi dig besvara urvalsfrågor samt kort motivera varför du passar för rollen. Att besvara frågorna är en förutsättning för att din ansökan ska anses komplett.
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan - Tillsammans är vi Karolinska!
   

  

 Inför tillsättning av befattning som innefattar vård av barn och ungdom, kontrolleras den som erbjuds tjänsten mot misstanke- och belastningsregistret. Här kan du läsa mer om rekryteringsprocessen och om vilka kontroller som utförs på Karolinska.
   

  

 Som anställd på Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset kan du komma att krigsplaceras. Läs mer om vad det innebär här.
   

  

 Om du är eller tidigare har varit anställd i Region Stockholm kommer vi att ta interna referenser från din nuvarande eller tidigare chef, om du blir aktuell för anställning.
   

  

 För tillsvidaretjänster kan provanställning komma att tillämpas.
   

  

**Om Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset**
 Vi på Karolinska Universitetssjukhuset är stolta över att vi är ett av världens främsta universitetssjukhus. Förutom vårt särskilda ansvar för den högspecialiserade vården i Stockholmsregionen är huvuduppdraget att tillsammans med Karolinska Institutet utbilda framtidens vårdanställda och bedriva världsledande forskning samtidigt som vi fortsätter vårt arbete med att utveckla vården för patientens bästa. Vi arbetar inom en rad olika områden och professioner.
   

  

 Vår vision - Vi ska bota och lindra imorgon det ingen kan bota och lindra idag.
   

  

 Läs gärna mer om oss på karolinska.se och följ oss på sociala medier!
   

  

**IT Portfölj**
 För att stödja sjukhusets alla kliniska verksamheter arbetar jurister, ekonomer, kommunikatörer, HR, Inköpare och IT för att vi tillsammans ska generera vård i världsklass och vara en verkligt Attraktiv Arbetsgivare! Här kan du läsa mer om oss.
   

  

**Att söka jobb i Region Stockholm**
 Vi eftersträvar jämställdhet och jämlikhet på vår arbetsplats och ser gärna sökande med olika bakgrund och förutsättningar.
   

  

 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via detta system. Ansök genom att klicka på knappen ”Ansök”. Ansökningar per brev eller e-post beaktas inte. Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare av ytterligare jobbannonser.
   

  

 Vårt rekryteringssystem kan inte hantera anonyma ansökningar eller sökande med skyddade personuppgifter. Om du har skyddade personuppgifter ber vi dig att kontakta den kontaktpersonen som finns angiven i annonsen. Din ansökan kommer då att hanteras utanför rekryteringssystemet. Du bör även vara försiktig med vilken information du lämnar i din ansökan och endast ta med information som är relevant för den aktuella befattningen.
   

  

 Region Stockholm ansvarar för hälso- och sjukvård, kollektivtrafik, regional utveckling och bidrar till kulturlivet. Varje dag, dygnet runt. I landets snabbaste växande region. Tillsammans skapar vi Europas attraktivaste storstadsregion.
   

  

 Läs mer om hur det är att jobba hos oss i Region Stockholm (öppnas i nytt fönster)

title: Principal Partner Delivery Success Manager
description:
**Meet Our Team**
 Join Pega at a pivotal moment of transformation — as a Partner Delivery Success Manager (PDSM) owning the delivery success and enablement programs of Pega's strategic partners across EMEA Central, including the Nordics, DACH, and the Middle East. Every major business is reimagining how it works. As a recognised industry leader in strategic business applications — celebrated by analysts at Forrester and Gartner — Pega partners with the world's leading Systems Integrators to transform how enterprises deliver outcomes at scale. Our Partner team is at the heart of that mission, and this role sits right at its leading edge.
   

  

**Picture Yourself At Pega**
 As a Partner Delivery Success Manager, you will play a strategic, advisory role within Pega's partner ecosystem — working exclusively with major Global System Integrators to drive delivery transformation and practice excellence. This is a high-impact role on reshaping how our partners implement Pega at scale, embedding modern delivery methodologies.
   

  

 Operating across the practice, individual, and project levels, you will engage with partner executives and delivery leaders to define enablement strategies, build community, and influence how an entire region approaches Pega delivery. You will have a genuine seat at the table — shaping regional strategy and operating with the kind of autonomy that allows you to make a real and lasting difference.
   

  

 At Pega, we actively explore and embrace emerging AI capabilities with curiosity, responsibility, and a drive for meaningful innovation. You will work in an environment where AI-enabled tools are used to enhance learning, improve engineering efficiency and support better decision-making across the cloud platform.
   

  

**What You'll Do At Pega**
* Lead strategic engagement with Pega strategic partners across EMEA Central, driving delivery excellence and transforming partner delivery practices at a programmatic level
* Champion the adoption of Pega's modern delivery approaches — particularly Blueprint Delivered — across partner organisations, engaging at both executive and practitioner levels
* Proactively support partners in achieving and sustaining delivery health, intervening strategically when challenges arise rather than managing at the operational detail
* Build and maintain trusted relationships with senior delivery leaders and partner executives, influencing with empathy across complex, matrixed organisations
* Collaborate cross-functionally with Pega's Alliance, GTM, Sales, and Consulting teams to align on partner capacity, enablement needs, and strategic priorities across the region
* Design and lead enablement programmes that up-skill partner teams, embedding Pega best practices into their delivery methodology and project lifecycle
* Advise on and contribute to the development of technical enablement content, representing the voice of the partner ecosystem
* Manage a strategic view of partner project health across your region, identifying risks early and coordinating appropriate support
* Identify and develop community-building opportunities across the regional delivery ecosystem, elevating Pega's profile and value within partner organisations


**Who You Are**
 You bring a rare combination of delivery credibility and strategic thinking — someone who has within complex delivery environments and understands the partner world. You may have come from a major Systems Integrator or Consulting organisation and you know what it takes to drive change across large, matrixed partner practices.
   

  

 You are a natural influencer — someone who can persuade, inspire, and build consensus without relying on direct authority. You possess high levels of empathy, patience, and cultural intelligence, and you thrive when working across diverse international contexts.
   

  

 While deep Pega experience is advantageous, it is not essential. You can also come from broader enterprise software delivery backgrounds with the right partner ecosystem experience and strategic mindset.
   

  

* Demonstrable professional experience in delivery success, partner engagement, or strategic enablement within enterprise technology environments
* Proven background in working with large System Integrators or Consulting organisations, with a strong understanding of enterprise delivery methodologies
* Exceptional communication and influencing skills, with a demonstrated ability to engage and build trust at executive level across culturally diverse environments
* A strategic, programmatic thinker who can see the big picture and drive change at scale — without getting pulled into the operational detail
* International experience and genuine comfort working across multiple countries and cultures.
* Experience in technical delivery enablement programmes is a strong advantage


**What You've Accomplished**
 You have successfully driven delivery transformation and enablement initiatives within partner or SI organisations, and you have a strong track record of influencing senior stakeholders across complex, international environments. You've shaped programmes, built communities, and left delivery practices stronger than you found them — and you're ready to do the same across one of Pega's most exciting and dynamic regions
   

  

**Pega Offers You**
* A rapidly growing yet well-established business, with the stability of a market leader and the energy of a company still evolving
* The opportunity to work with the world's leading Strategic Consulting and Systems Integrators across a diverse and dynamic region
* Significant autonomy to shape, define, and execute the regional partner delivery strategy — this is a role where your impact will be visible and lasting
* Analyst acclaimed technology leadership in a massive emerging market, with direct exposure to cutting-edge GenAI technologies including Blueprint
* The world's most innovative organisations as referenceable clients and partners


 Job ID: 23463

title: Engineering Manager - Area Avanza International
description:
**Building an European Presence — Denmark as the First Step in Our International Expansion Strategy** 




 At Avanza, we’ve spent over 20 years building Sweden’s best platform for savers. Now, we’re asking ourselves: If we were to build that same trust and magic today, using the technology and AI of 2026, what would it look like?
 



  





 We are taking our first big step outside of Sweden, starting with Denmark. We aren’t just "copy-pasting" our Swedish success; we are building a brand-new, international platform from the ground up - leveraging on our Swedish success. Our goal is to move from being a world-class platform to being a
 **true financial partner** 
 for our customers—building something that doesn't just hold their money, but proactively helps them grow it.
 



  





 To do this, we are creating a dedicated, cross-functional International Area. We are now looking for an
 **Engineering Manager** 
 to join this area and help us define the next generation of Avanza.
 



  





**The Mission: Building a Platform for “European Expansion”** 




 In this role, you will build and support a cross-functional team in an environment defined by agility and a startup mindset. Your mission is to help define Avanza’s international future, fostering an AI-first foundation and navigating a modern tech stack in GCP to create a scalable, greenfield platform.
 



  





 You will empower your team to move past traditional boundaries, using 2026 technology to build a financial co-pilot that makes saving feel intuitive and helpful. By combining your technical insight with a people-first leadership style, you will guide the development of a product our customers truly love.
 



  





 We want to move past traditional banking interfaces to create a proactive, personal financial co-pilot that helps customers make better decisions every day. Denmark is our first destination, but you will be building the modular blueprint for everything that follows.
