title: Sommarjobb Reception & Restaurang, Scandic Mölndal
description:
Ansök nu
* Ansök senast: 11 maj 2026
* Göteborg
* Arbete på plats
**Arbetsuppgifter**
-------------------

Scandic Mölndal ligger centralt beläget vid Mölndals Galleria med goda kommunikationer till Göteborg. Hotellet har en mycket inbjudande miljö för våra gäster. Våra mötesrum är personliga och vår lobby är ett vardagsrum där våra gäster sluter upp. Vi är alla delar av samma team och jobbar tillsammans med mycket glädje och engagemang. Vi har alltid fokus på vårt gemensamma arbete och sluter upp tillsammans där det behövs. Vi är övertygade om att en god stämning bland oss medarbetare leder till enastående hotellupplevelser för våra gäster.


**Nu söker vi en Receptionist/Servis till Scandic Mölndal.**



Oavsett varför gästen kommer till oss är det få saker som är så uppskattade som ett vänligt ansikte som hälsar välkommen. Du agerar värd tillsammans med övriga teamet på hotellet och skapar en gästupplevelse i världsklass.



Hos oss får du ta ett stort eget ansvar för att ta de beslut som krävs för att göra gästen nöjd och teamen utvecklar och förbättrar arbetssätt och service i takt med att omvärlden förändras. Vi är nämligen övertygade om att det är när du får utvecklas och bidra med all din kompetens och erfarenhet som vi överträffar gästens förväntningar. På köpet får vi kul på jobbet!



Så ta med dig dina erfarenheter, ditt engagemang och ditt sätt att tänka till oss – och bidra till en kultur där vi bryr oss på riktigt: om varandra, våra gäster och vår planet. Välkommen till Scandic!


**Vad är innebär rollen?**



Du som arbetar i receptionen är ansvarig för att våra gäster får service i världsklass. Du är spindeln i nätet som ser till att gästen alltid är i fokus. Du är den som går igenom ankomstlistan och lägger tid på detaljerna. Ser till att gästens önskemål uppfylls. Du har alltid ett leende på läpparna och en kreativ lösning i bakfickan. Du löser det mesta och är en stjärna på att vända en missnöjd gäst till en nöjd gäst. Din arbetsplats är vår lobby. För det är där du möter flest gäster. I ansvarsområdet ingår även administrativt arbete, säkerhetsarbete och arbete med försäljning.



Arbetet i receptionen innebär att checka in och ut hotellets gäster, hälsa välkommen och ge gästen den information den behöver om sin vistelse. Du hanterar bokningar i systemet Opera Cloud och hanterar administrativa uppgifter runt gäster och säkerhet. Allt arbete sker med gästnöjdhet och försäljning i fokus.



Du jobbar även delvis i vår Restaurang där du är det första gästen möter, därför är det av stor vikt att du har ett varmt bemötande och är uppmärksam på detaljer samt gästens behov. Du har ett intresse för mat och dryck samt gillar ordning och reda, både i ditt eget och dina kollegors arbete. Allt för att ge våra gäster en fantastisk måltidsupplevelse. Dina arbetsuppgifter blir att servera mat och dryck och att ansvara för egen kassa. Erfarenhet från restaurangjobb ser vi som meriterande.



Hotellet har öppet dygnet runt och det är därför viktigt att du trivs med att arbeta i skift (förmiddagar, eftermiddagar och helger).


**Vem är du?**



För att passa i rollen tror vi att du har en väl utvecklad social förmåga och är kapabel att hantera att det händer många olika saker samtidigt. Det är mycket viktigt att du kan förmedla ett gott värdskap till hotellets gäster.



Du har också vana och kunskap i att arbeta med dator som arbetsredskap.



Eftersom arbetet till stor del består av att kommunicera med gäster är goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska en förutsättning. Talar du ytterligare ett språk är det meriterande.



Allra viktigast är dock dina personliga egenskaper och din inställning. För att passa i rollen behöver du vara en lyhörd och prestigelös lagspelare som tar ett stort ansvar för dina arbetsuppgifter och helhetsresultatet.


**Information om tjänsten**



Tjänsten är ett sommarjobb.



Vi tar enbart emot ansökningar via vår hemsida. Alla ansökningar kommer att behandlas löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdag, varför vi ber dig att ansöka så snart som möjligt. I denna rekrytering använder vi oss av ett enklare test om service vid urvalet.



Vi ser fram emot att välkomna dig till oss på Scandic!



Ps. på vår hemsida kan du läsa mer om vår kultur, vad tjänsten innebär och om våra förmåner!
company_description: Nordiskt hotellföretag i världsklass som skapar enastående upplevelser för de många människorna. 16 000 medarbetar, 280 hotell i 6 länder.

title: MARKNADSKOORDINATOR
description:
**MARKNADSKOORDINATOR - REJMES - HALLAND**
==========================================

#### **PLATS**

**Halmstad**

#### **SISTA ANSÖKNINGSDATUM**

**2026-05-31**

#### **ARBETSPLATS**

**On-site**

**REJMES BIL**
--------------

**REJMES BIL I HALLAND är en mycket välrenommerad Volvohandlare med verksamhet i Falkenberg, Laholm och Halmstad. Vi representerar, som enda privata handlare i Sverige, unikt Volvo Cars Sverige med försäljning och service av Volvobilar.****ÄR DU VÅR NÄSTA LAGSPELARE INOM FÖRSÄLJNING OCH MARKNAD?**


Vill du vara med och stärka vår marknadskommunikation och se till att våra produkter och vårt varumärke syns där de ska - på rätt sätt och i rätt sammanhang? Då kan du vara den vi söker!


Hos oss på Rejmes blir du en viktig del av ett engagerat team där vi tillsammans ser till att vi fortsätter vara ett starkt och tydligt namn i branschen. Nu letar vi efter dig som har koll på hur man faktiskt når ut idag, via branschmedier, LinkedIn och sociala kanaler.

**DINA ARBETSUPPGIFTER:**


Arbeta med utskick och kampanjflöden enligt marknadsplan.
Ansvarar för kontakt med externa annonsörer och samarbetspartners.
Planering och genomförande av event.
Jobba med material till vår hemsida.
Dagligt arbete i META - Facebook, Instagram och LinkedIn.
Vara drivande i att skapa leads och affärsmöjligheter för sälj och servicemarknad.

Utöver marknadsansvaret är du engagerad i verksamhetens utveckling inom försäljning och service, där du bidrar till att stärka kundrelationer och affär.


Vi söker dig som är självgående, strukturerad och har ett starkt driv att utveckla både varumärke och affär.I rollen är du med från idé till genomförande i våra marknadsaktiviteter. Du driver saker framåt tillsammans med teamet och gillar att få saker att hända. Du kommer jobba brett där du ofta tar lead i planeringen. Du är också den personen som har kontakt med externa partners.

### **DU HAR**


Erfarenhet från en liknande roll med ett affärstänk och förståelse för samspelet mellan marknad och sälj. Du har tidigare arbetat och trivs i en bred roll med varierande uppgifter. Du har en utbildning inom marknadsföring, kommunikation eller liknande. Om du redan kan jobba i Salesforce Marketing Cloud blir vi glada.

### **SÅ ÄR VI – OCH SÅ HOPPAS VI ATT DU ÄR**


Hos oss värdesätter vi gemenskap, ansvar och nyfikenhet. Vi tror att du är en kreativ person som gillar att testa nya idéer, har känsla för form och färg och trivs med struktur i vardagen.


Du är initiativtagande och ser helheten men har också öga för detaljer. Eftersom rollen innebär mycket kommunikation är det viktigt att du känner dig trygg i att uttrycka dig både muntligt och skriftligt. Vi söker helt enkelt en doer.

### **VARFÖR REJMES?**


Hos oss får du en varierad vardag, möjlighet att påverka din roll och arbeta med många olika kontaktytor. Vi är ett engagerat team som stöttar varandra, har kul tillsammans och är stolta över det vi gör.

**ANSÖKAN**


Vill du bli en del av Rejmes då vill vi gärna höra från dig. Urvalet sker löpande, så vänta inte med att skicka in din ansökan. Ansvarig rekryterare är Theresia Andersson

**Placeringsort: Halmstad**

  

Vi är **FSK**, the Generator – ett bolag som driver utveckling och tillväxt genom våra tre affärsområden Talent, Brand och Growth.

**Talent** – Vi hjälper framåtlutade företag att hitta rätt människor, framförallt inom Management, Sales and Marketing.

**Brand** – Vi stärker varumärken genom Employer Branding och Business Branding.

**Growth** – Vi skapar inspirerande och utmanande utbildningar som utvecklar företag för framtiden.

  


**ANSVARIG REKRYTERARE**
------------------------

### **THERESIA ANDERSSON**

title: Senior Field Marketing Manager
description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.


We are hiring a Senior Field Marketing Manager for our Marketing team. This is a strategic, senior-level role at the heart of Snowflake's EMEA go-to-market. You will own the field marketing strategy for the Scandinavian countries, shaping how Snowflake shows up in market across an enterprise buyer landscape that is increasingly shaped by AI. Beyond running your own programs, you will set the direction for how the region markets, mentor junior marketers, and bring a point of view on what the Nordics market needs that influence the broader EMEA strategy.

**AS A SENIOR FIELD MARKETING MANAGER AT SNOWFLAKE, YOU WILL:**

* Define and own the field marketing strategy for Scandinavia, setting the regional approach to pipeline generation, brand presence, and customer engagement
* Own the full event life cycle for the region - Drive logistics, operations and execution of all planned events. Help shape event themes, close collaboration with local marketing team, work with outside vendors, oversee fulfillment/inventory levels, manage events’ sales staffing etc.
* Build and execute a comprehensive integrated marketing calendar spanning field events, executive programs, ABM campaigns, and digital demand generation
* Serve as the primary marketing stakeholder for the Scandinavia sales leadership team, co-developing go-to-market plans and aligning marketing investment to revenue priorities
* Maintain direct alignment with sales team in terms of all pre and post-event communication, marketing-driven campaigns, and event promotion strategy
* Drive account-based marketing at scale for the region's most strategic accounts, coordinating across marketing disciplines to deliver cohesive, high-impact programs
* Mentor and provide guidance to junior field marketing team members across EMEA, raising the team's collective capability and program quality
* Contribute to EMEA-wide marketing strategy discussions, bringing Nordics market insight and challenging assumptions about how and where the team
* Invests
* Collaborate with the alliances' organization on Snowflake’s strategic sponsorships and go-to-market execution plan at partner events
* Establish measurement frameworks and reporting cadences that connect marketing activity to pipeline, revenue influence, and customer expansion

 **OUR IDEAL SENIOR FIELD MARKETING MANAGER WILL HAVE:**

* 8+ years of experience in field marketing, regional marketing, or demand generation in enterprise B2B technology
* Proven ability to define and own a regional marketing strategy, not just execute against one
* Proven track record of negotiation skills with vendors and suppliers.
* Track record of building trusted, peer-level relationships with sales leadership and influencing joint planning without direct authority
* Deep experience running executive engagement programs and high-stakes fieldevents that deliver measurable pipeline outcomes
* Experience running 300+ attendee events.
* Strong command of account-based marketing strategy, from account selection through multi-channel activation and measurement
* Proficiency in marketing automation, CRM, and analytics platforms as supporting tools; experience using AI workflows to drive scale and efficiency is strongly preferred
* Fluency in English; fluency in Swedish; and another Nordic language is a significant plus.
* **The role requires 3 days onsite in our Snowflake Offices**

**BONUS POINTS FOR THE FOLLOWING:**

* Experience shaping field marketing strategy across multiple EMEA sub-regions or markets simultaneously
* Background in cloud data, analytics, or AI platform marketing in the Nordics enterprise landscape
* Track record of mentoring or developing junior marketers in a distributed team environment
* Experience with AI or GenAI tools (such as Cortex AI) to accelerate campaign creation, personalization, or audience intelligence
* Familiarity with Snowflake's go-to-market motion or comparable enterprise data platform ecosystems


Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.


How do you want to make your impact?


For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com

title: Engineering Manager, Observability Dept | Sweden | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies - including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay - manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).



We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.



You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.



This is a remote position. We are looking for candidates in the NASA (EST-only) or EMEA time zones.


**What is Grafana Cloud?**



Grafana Cloud is our composable observability platform that integrates metrics, logs, traces, and profiles with Grafana. It allows our customers to leverage the best open source observability software – including Prometheus, Mimir, Loki, Tempo, and Pyroscope – without the overhead of installing, maintaining and scaling their own observability stack.



The Observability department is focused on enabling developers to understand the health and performance of their applications and infrastructure in any environment by providing tools to instrument their code, ingest observability data into Grafana Cloud and visualize and explore it.


**What is Grafana Alloy?**



Alloy is a distribution of the OpenTelemetry collector. Its purpose is to collect, process, and export telemetry signals at scale. Alloy combines the strength of leading ecosystems like OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Loki, Pyroscope, and more. Alloy is an open source project that is maintained on Github.


**What You'll Be Doing:**


* Manage and develop the team of Alloy engineers, providing regular feedback and supporting each person’s growth through career conversations. This is a remote team, distributed between EMEA and NASA.
* Support the Alloy team on their path to closer collaboration with the OpenTelemetry collector community. Address roadblocks.
* Collaborate closely with go-to-market to ensure customers and prospects are successful with their Alloy journey.
* Work closely with product and engineering leadership to ensure Alloy fits seamlessly into the end-to-end user experience for Grafana cloud products.
* Provide guidance throughout the project lifecycle from early ideation through planning, execution and post‑launch guiding the team to deliver high‑quality results consistently.
* Foster a psychologically safe environment where engineers can learn, experiment and iterate quickly, encouraging innovation and a culture of continuous improvement.
* Work across team boundaries by contributing to projects outside your team’s scope and partnering with other functions to solve customer problems.


As a company we are remote-first and global, we embrace people of different experiences and backgrounds to build diverse teams where every person brings a new perspective to the software.



We invest heavily in developer productivity. You can use modern AI coding assistants as part of your daily workflow (your choice of tools, within security guidelines), backed by a company-funded usage budget so you can iterate quickly without unnecessary friction. We encourage pragmatic AI-assisted development: faster prototyping, test generation, refactors, documentation, and incident follow-ups—always paired with strong code review and quality standards. You’ll also have access to frontier models (e.g., GPT-Codex 5.4, Claude Opus 4.7, Gemini 3 Pro).


**What are we looking for in you?**


* You should have enough domain knowledge in observability and OpenTelemetry to manage a team that will collaborate closely with the OpenTelemetry collector community.
* You will be comfortable working with engineering teams who have a strong sense of autonomy in their decision-making, be it technical or product focused.
* While you’re great with people and adept at managing relationships, you still keep up-to-date with the latest technical trends and shifts in order to maintain and enhance your understanding of the challenges your teams face.
* Comfortable collaborating across time zones and cultures in a fully remote environment, using clear, empathetic communication to build trust, connection, and psychological safety.
* Demonstrated ability to manage complexity, align stakeholders, and elevate team performance to deliver meaningful, high-quality results.
* Deeply customer-focused, consistently grounding decisions and technical choices in user needs and real-world impact.
* Solid understanding of distributed systems principles, including scalability, fault tolerance, consistency, and observability.

#### **Comfort with AI-assisted tooling.****We embrace AI and agentic development so we expect you to be curious and comfortable using AI-powered tools and ideally have practical experience folding them into a team’s workflow.**

**In Sweden the Base compensation range for this role is SEK** **878,578** **- SEK 1,054,000 Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed in the interview process. Benefits include equity, bonus (if applicable) and other benefits listed** **here****.**



#LI-Remote



* *Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.*


**Why You’ll Thrive at Grafana Labs:**


* **100% Remote, Global Culture -** As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* **Scaling Organization** – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* **Transparent Communication** – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* **Innovation-Driven** – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* **Open Source Roots** – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* **Empowered Teams** – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* **Career Growth Pathways** – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* **Approachable Leadership** – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* **Passionate People** – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* **In-Person onboarding** - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* **Balance is Key** - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. *\*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.*


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.


*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*



#LI-Remote



*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our* *privacy policy**.*
company_description: Grafana Labs is the company behind Grafana, the leading open source software for visualizing time series data.

We are seeking a highly skilled **SIL Engineer** will have substantial experience with Matlab/Simulink toolchains in a CI/CD environment, focusing on automation, simulation profiling for Model-in-the-Loop (MIL) and Software-in-the-Loop (SIL), and code generation workflows.

* Self-motivated and able to work independently as well as part of a team.

title: AI Engineer till Avanzas AI-plattformsteam
description:
*Vill du vara med och bygga fundamentet för hur AI används i hjärtat av Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och investeringar? Vi startar nu ett dedikerat AI-plattformsteam med uppdraget att göra Avanza ”AI-first” genom att bygga verktyg och infrastruktur för framtidens kundupplevelse och nutidens utvecklarupplevelse.*


*Vi söker passionerade AI-utvecklare som vill vara med från start och bygga ett team som möjliggör för hela Avanza att skapa värde med AI på ett säkert, skalbart och innovativt sätt.*


### **Om rollen**


Som en del av AI-plattformsteamet har du ett brett och spännande mandat. Din mission är dubbel: du ska både skapa en utvecklarupplevelse i världsklass genom AI-driven utveckling (DevEx), och bygga en robust AI-plattform i Google Cloud som bär våra framtida kundfunktioner. Du kommer att arbeta nära våra utvecklingsteam för att utforska, testa och sätta standarder för AI-engineering på Avanza.


**Du kommer bland annat att:**


* Driva AI-driven DevEx: Skapa en utvecklarmiljö som möjliggör AI-first utveckling i våra produkt- och plattformsteam. Utforska och utveckla ekosystem runt AI-driven utveckling samt Gemini Enterprise för att göra våra kollegor mer effektiva.
* Bygga agenter och automatiseringar: Utveckla och drifta MCP-servrar, agenter och andra system som automatiserar interna arbetsflöden.
* Utveckla AI-plattformen: Sätta upp den tekniska grunden i GCP och Vertex AI för AI-baserade features i våra produkter.
* Enablement & Coaching: Arbeta nära våra produkt- och plattformsteam och övriga Avanza för att stötta dem i AI-resan.
* Säkerställa kontroll: Samarbeta kring riskbedömningar i vårt AI-råd och tillsammans med säkerhetsteam implementera guardrails och säkerhetslösningar som skyddar både vår data och våra kunder.

### **Din profil:**


Vi söker dig som inte bara följer utvecklingen inom AI, utan som redan har börjat bygga, experimentera och använda AI som en naturlig del av ditt arbete. Du trivs i en miljö där ”best practice” ännu inte är skriven och motiveras av att skapa konkret värde här och nu, snarare än att fastna i eviga utvärderingar och piloter.


Då teamet är ett plattformsteam är du prestigelös och får en kick av att hjälpa dina kollegor att lyckas, samtidigt som du har förmågan att stänga in dig och fokusera djupt på komplexa ännu olösta problem.


**Vidare tror vi att du har:**


* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av professionell mjukvaruutveckling och en stark arkitektonisk förståelse från fler än en tidigare arbetsplats.
* Erfarenhet av AI-engineering. Du har arbetat praktiskt med LLM-integrationer, prompt engineering och bygga agenter.
* God förståelse för modern, AI-driven spec-driven kodning.
* Erfarenhet av molnmiljöer (vi kör GCP/Vertex AI).
* Kunskap om, eller ett stort intresse för, kontext-engineering, MCP-servrar, och allt relaterat.
* Förmågan att kommunicera komplex teknik på ett pedagogiskt sätt till kollegor i hela organisationen.
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal och skrift.

**Meriterande:**


* Expertis inom GCP (Terraform, IAM, projektstruktur)
* Erfarenhet av säkerhet och riskbedömning kopplat till AI och data.
* Bakgrund från reglerade miljöer (finans/bank).
* Programmering i Python eller annat scriptspråk
* Hos oss får du chansen att vara med i det mest spännande teknikskiftet i vår tid, i ett team där din påverkan på Avanzas framtid blir direkt och mätbar. Vi lovar högt tempo, stor frihet och ett gäng fantastiska kollegor.

### **Ansökan**


Skicka in din ansökan via "Ansök nu"-knappen i annonsen. Urval sker löpande, så vänta inte – vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!


Har du frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta Mats Oldin, Head of AI Engineering, på mats.oldin@avanza.se.


*Vi undanber oss vänligen men bestämt kontakt från rekryteringsföretag och annonssäljare.*

title: STAFF ENGINEER
description:
**STAFF ENGINEER**


We’re on an ambitious transformation journey — evolving our architecture, scaling our platforms, and enabling a stronger engineering culture. As a Staff Engineer at Avanza, you’ll be part of a new and influential technical leadership layer that drives technical strategy, architectural direction, and long-term engineering excellence across our organization.
This is a role for someone who enjoys solving complex problems, collaborating widely, and empowering others — and who wants real ownership, impact, in a genuinely supportive culture.
**About the Role**
As a Staff Engineer you’ll join our Product & Tech organization, consisting of 8 areas and ~45 development teams — a total of almost 400 people. Your main focus will be in one of the areas but you will collaborate closely with other Staff Engineers, Engineering Directors, and our CTO.
This is a new and strategically important role at Avanza, giving you significant influence over the scope, mandate, and long-term direction of the role. You will:  

* Provide technical leadership and mentoring across teams, helping teams make high-quality engineering decisions.
  
* Guide architectural work: design scalable, secure, and sustainable solutions and support teams in breaking down complexity.
  
* Drive Avanza’s broader technical direction, such as cloud transformation, global expansion, AI and personalization.
  
* Collaborate deeply with product, engineering leads, and other stakeholders to align technology with business and area goals.
  
* Explore new technologies, challenge old assumptions, and contribute to our long-term strategy through vision, insight, and hands-on when needed.
  

As the role is practical, collaborative, and highly influential, we prefer that you work on site from our head office in Stockholm 3-4 days per week. We believe the best results emerge in secure and trusting teams where everyone is heard.
**Who We’re Looking For**
You are likely an experienced Staff or Principal Engineer, or bring equivalent senior technical leadership experience from a similar role. Most importantly, you’re someone who thrives in change, believes in inclusive collaboration, and wants to help shape a modern engineering organization.
**Required Experience**  

* Previous experience as Staff/Principal Engineer or similar senior technical leadership role.
  
* Demonstrated extensive experience working in cloud (preferably GCP or AWS).
  
* Strong ability to guide teams, mentor engineers, and lead technical initiatives across multiple domains.
  
* Proven capability to solve complex problems and make data-informed architectural decisions.
  
* Excellent communication skills with both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
  

**Meritorious Experience**  

* Strategy work within AI-assisted development.
  
* Experience working in regulated environments (finance or fintech is a plus).
  

We’re looking for someone who combines confidence with humility — a collaborative team player who listens well and values diverse perspectives. You think strategically but are equally comfortable stepping in hands-on when needed. You’re curious, proactive, and genuinely passionate about modern technology, and you thrive in a fast-evolving environment where solving complex problems is part of the everyday. You like to see things progress. When things get stuck, you step in, take ownership, and resolve them.


**Our Culture**


We are currently a Swedish-speaking organization, but we welcome English-speaking candidates for this role — as long as you’re comfortable working in an environment where much of the daily communication, meetings, and documentation is still in Swedish. This is something that may evolve over time.  

  



#### **Application**


 The final application date is 29/5 -26.  

  

Apply today and join us on our transformation journey!
*We kindly decline offers from recruitment agencies/advertising vendors*

title: Infrastructure Engineer
description:
### **Om tjänsten**


I tjänsten som Infrastructure Engineer kommer du arbeta tillsammans med ett team i en modern IT-miljö. Du kommer att arbeta med att administrera och automatisera storskaliga system och vi söker efter dig som har arbetat med cloud, virtualisering och moderna Lagringstekniker. Som Infrastructure Engineer är det en självklarhet att definiera infrastruktur som kod för att underlätta din och andras vardag. Vi ser att du, precis som vi, vill lära dig om, och jobba mer med containers och cloud samtidigt som det behöver fungera med en existerande on-prem lösning. Vi arbetar i GCP som molnplattform.


#### **Du kommer även att arbeta med:**


* Definiera och hantera infrastruktur som kod


* Hantera virtualiseringslösningar som Openshift Virtualization, HyperV


* Arbeta med moderna lagringstekniker

  

  

Du kommer att ingå i vårt Infrastructure-team på 8 personer som tillsammans ser till att vi alltid levererar stabila och säkra tjänster till våra kunder. Du kommer få möjlighet att utvecklas i ett engagerat team som ger dig mycket förtroende och som team ansvarar man för att tillhandahålla våra bas-infrastrukturtjänster och även att ständigt framtidssäkra vår IT-miljö.


### **Vem vi söker**


För att vara framgångsrik i rollen som Infrastructure Engineer hos oss bör du vara ennyfiken problemlösare med en passion för teknik och drivkraft att ständigt förbättra. Ditt engagemang att vilja lära dig mer om och hålla dig uppdaterad kring de senaste teknikerna är viktigt för att du ska ta dig an nya utmaningar. Vidare söker vi dig med en analytisk förmåga som kommer att vara avgörande i rollen för att effektivt optimera våra system och identifiera komplexa tekniska utmaningar som kan uppstå. Vi söker flera Infrastructure engineers med olika kompetensområden om du känner att du inte täcker in allt i beskrivningen.


#### **Vi ser gärna att du har:**


* Goda kunskaper inom datacenterinfrastruktur och plattformar som Openshift, Kubernetes eller HyperV


* God erfarenhet av Linuxsystemadministration (RHEL) i stor skala


* Goda kunskaper inom Cloud (GCP, Azure)


* Kunskap i IaC-verktyg som Puppet, Ansible, Terraform


* Färdigheter inom moderna lagringstekniker som Dell Powerstore

  

  

Du ska trivas i en dynamisk miljö där förändring och innovation är en del av vardagen. Du har förmågan att snabbt anpassa dig till nya situationer och möjligheter som uppstår. Vi erbjuder dig en arbetsplats med mycket frihet att få pröva dina kunskaper på egen hand, men som även ser samarbetet med teamet som en värdefull del av ditt arbete. Vi tror på kraften i samarbete och kunskapsutbyte med kollegor för att tillsammans skapa framgångsrika projekt. Vi hoppas att du delar denna syn och vill bli en del av vårt Infrastructure-team.


### **Ansökan**


. Skicka gärna din ansökan snarast då urvalet sker löpande. Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mail p.g.a. GDPR. Kontakta gärna Marie Grenander, Engineering Manager, på marie.grenander@avanza.se om du har några frågor om tjänsten.


Välkommen med din ansökan!


*Erbjudanden från rekryteringsföretag/annonssäljare undanbedes.*

title: Plattformsutvecklare för strömmad data
description:
*Vill du bygga fundamentet för ett eventdrivet Avanza? Som Plattformsutvecklare skapar du förutsättningarna för våra autonoma team genom modern molninfrastruktur, Data Mesh och en passion för arkitektur. Här får du mandatet att forma den plattform som driver allt från handelsflöden i realtid till nästa generations kundupplevelse.*

### **Om teamet och rollen**


Team Data Distribution är ett plattformsteam med ansvar att utveckla Event Driven Architecture som möjliggör våra mikrotjänster. Vi servar över 40 produktteam, med en distribuerad strömningsplattform baserad på Kafka. Komponenten är verksamhetskritisk för allt från orderläggning och handelsflöden i realtid till uppdateringar av kontosaldon och notifieringar.


På Avanza är våra produktteam autonoma och därför arbetar vi utifrån Data Mesh- ramverket där self-service och domain ownership är våra ledstjärnor. Det som gjort oss framgångsrika genom åren är att vi ser plattformen som en produkt (Platform as a Product), med en tydlig produktroadmap och en nära relation till våra användare där vi ständigt utforskar deras behov, genom bl.a. användarintervjuer och demos. Vi jobbar datadrivet och mäter våra kollegors användning av plattformen, i syfte att ständigt underlätta deras vardag.


För stunden är vi på god väg att lämna våra egen hostade Kafka-kluster till förmån för Confluent Cloud, där effekten för oss blir mindre fokus på drift och mer utforskande av nya tekniker samt mer tid till en förbättrad developer experience.


Team Data Distributions mission är: Göra det enkelt att kommunicera eventdrivet i distribuerade system samt att tillgängliggöra och förädla strömmande data.


#### **Hos oss kommer du att:**


* Utveckla och underhålla plattform för eventdriven kommunikation
* Sätta standarder och mönster för hur produktteamen konsumerar data i realtid
* Hjälpa andra team genom att utbilda i best practices kring event driven architecture
* Utvärdera och implementera nästa generations verktyg inom strömmande data
* Jobba med tekniker som Kafka, GCP, Terraform, Confluent Cloud

### **Din profil:**


För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du är en senior utvecklare som älskar Java, men som också har lyft blicken för att bemästra applikationsarkitektur i sin helhet. Du har praktisk erfarenhet av Event Driven Architecture och trivs i miljöer där händelsestyrda flöden står i centrum. Som person är du prestigelös och hjälpsam – ditt starka service mindset gör att du naturligt stöttar teamet och bidrar till en positiv, samarbetande arbetskultur.


##### **Kvalifikationer:**


* Bekväm med Infrastructure as Code (t.ex. Terraform eller liknande)
* Förmåga att göra komplexa saker enkla – för dig själv och för andra
* Har erfarenhet av att jobba i molnplattform (AWS/Azure/GCP)
* Erfarenhet av Spring Framework.
* Erfarenhet av distribuerade system

##### **Det är meriterande om du:**


* Jobbat med Kafka eller utvecklat plattform för strömmad data
* Jobbat som plattformsutvecklare
* Byggt realtidsanalys på strömmande data

### **Ansökan**


 Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!


Har du frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta Engineering Manager Afram Kourie på afram.kourie@avanza.se


Vi undanber oss vänligen men bestämt kontakt från rekryteringsföretag och annonssäljare.


Avdelning
Tech - Plattform
Platser
Regeringsgatan 103, Stockholm
**Om Avanza**
-------------


Avanza är Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och placeringar. Vi drivs av att förändra branschen genom att utmana de stora bankerna och försäkringsbolagen på den svenska sparmarknaden. Vi vill vara tjänsten som förenklar och förbättrar spararnas ekonomi, oavsett om man älskar aktier eller bara vill ha ett bra sparande. Vår vision är att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor. Därför står våra kunders bästa alltid i fokus, precis som det borde vara. Affärsidén är enkel – mer till dig, mindre till banken. En idé som gett oss Sveriges nöjdaste sparare 15 år i rad.


Grundades 1999
Medarbetare 700
company_description: Med visionen om att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor går vi till jobbet för att skapa billigare, bättre och enklare produkter och tjänster för våra kunder!

title: Quality & Environment Documentation Support, Student worker, Stockholm
description:
***KONEs mission is to improve the flow of urban life. KONE is one of the world's leading companies in the elevator and escalator industry. We supply elevators, escalators, gates, and automatic doors, as well as maintenance and modernization solutions for the entire life cycle of buildings. We help people move safely and comfortably in taller, smarter buildings. We call it People Flow. KONE class B shares are listed on the Nasdaq Helsinki Ltd. in Finland.***  



**ABOUT THE POSITION**  

This role offers hands-on experience in a global organization, exposure to quality and compliance processes, and the opportunity to work closely with experienced professionals. As a Student Worker in the Quality & Environmental (Q&E) department, you will play a key role in preparing our documentation landscape for future ownership by the Business Lines. Your work will directly contribute to compliance with global standards and help identify opportunities for digital improvements.


This is a part-time position equivalent to three days per week, offered on a temporary basis with the opportunity to gain valuable experience in quality, documentation, and digital information management. For the right person, this assignment may also open doors to future opportunities within the organization. The position is located in Kista, Stockholm, and spans approximately three quarters starting from the start date.


**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:*** Review, update, and harmonize existing Q&E-related documentation
* Support classification, structuring, and migration of documents according to the Global Policy
* Ensure proper document storage, version control, and traceability of changes
* Support the transition of document ownership to relevant Business Lines
* Identify opportunities for digital improvements, including structured use of Microsoft tools and potential AI-supported enhancements (where applicable)

**ABOUT YOU**  

We believe you are currently a student with a strong interest in digital systems and structured information management. Relevant fields of study may include computer science, information systems, or similar.


You likely have:


* Strong digital skills, good understanding of cloud storage concepts and digital document management
* Experience or familiarity with Microsoft tools, especially SharePoint
* A structured, detail-oriented mindset
* Good communication skills
* Fluent English skills, both written and spoken

  

**ABOUT KONE**  

We offer meaningful and challenging work where safety is always a priority. While we continue to improve, choosing safety every day is part of who we are. In our team, we live by our core values: caring, customer focus, cooperation, and courage. You will have the opportunity to learn, grow, and be part of a supportive team with strong career development prospects in a global organization.  

  



At KONE, you join a market leading and innovative company recognized on Forbes’ list of the world’s most innovative companies. We offer a flexible and open work environment with good development opportunities both in Sweden and internationally. You will have a varied and engaging role with freedom under responsibility and the ability to plan your own workday. KONE provides collective agreements, wellness benefits, and additional perks through our benefits portal.


**HOW TO APPLY**  

Selection is carried out on an ongoing basis, and the position may be filled before the final application date. The employment is part-time, with a start date by agreement. If you would like to know more about the position, you are welcome to contact Moa Lardner, Recruitment Specialist, at Moa.lardner@kone.com. We are unable to accept applications via email.  

  



We look forward to receiving your application!  

  



#LI-SCA


*At KONE, we are focused on creating an innovative and collaborative working culture where we value the contribution of each individual. Employee engagement is a key focus area for us and we encourage participation and the sharing of information and ideas. Sustainability is an integral part of our culture and the daily practice. We follow ethical business practices and we seek to develop a culture of working together where co-workers trust and respect each other and good performance is recognized. In being a great place to work, we are proud to offer a range of experiences and opportunities that will help you to achieve your career and personal goals and enable you to live a healthy and balanced life.*

Read more on *https://careers.kone.com/en/*
company_description: At KONE, our mission is to improve the flow of urban life. We understand People Flow in and between buildings, making people’s journeys safe, convenient and reliable.

title: Lead Qualification Specialist (part-time)
description:
TaxiCaller is on a mission to transform the transportation industry, providing our cloud services to taxi and bus companies around the world. We grow at a good pace and we are profitable.
  
We are now looking for a Lead Qualification Specialist to our growing sales team in Linköping.
  
  

About you
  
* Excellent verbal communication skills and a friendly, confident phone manner.
* You communicate clearly in English both verbally and in writing. It's a big plus if you also speak Spanish.
* Strong listening and interpersonal abilities.
* Prior experience in customer service, telemarketing, or sales is an advantage.
* Organized and detail-oriented with good note-taking and data entry skills.


About the position
  
We’re looking for a motivated and personable Lead Qualification Specialist to join our team on a part-time basis. In this role, you’ll be responsible for reaching out to potential clients who have already contacted us or signed up for a free trial.
  
You will be engaging them in friendly and professional conversations, and determining whether they’re a good fit for our cloud service.
  
Your work will play a vital part in helping our sales team focus their efforts on high-quality, well-qualified leads.
  
The working hours will be 13.00 to 17.00, Monday to Friday. The working hours can be slightly adjusted, but the work needs to be done in the afternoon.
  
  

Your daily tasks will include
  
* Make outbound calls to leads who have contacted us.
* Engage prospects in meaningful conversations to assess their needs, size and level of interest.
* Accurately document call outcomes and update our CRM system.
* Provide feedback and insights to enhance our lead generation and qualification processes.
* Collaborate closely with the sales and marketing teams.


It will be considered an advantage if
  
* You speak additional languages, especially Swedish, Finnish, or French.


For this position you need to already have a Swedish work permit.
  
  

**You can learn more about working with us here:** https://www.taxicaller.com/en/careers and here www.linkedin.com/company/taxicaller.
  
Recruitment will continue until we feel we’ve found the right fit, so we recommend applying as soon as possible and we look forward to hearing from you!

title: Partner Director, Nordics
description:
Saviynt's AI-powered identity platform manages and governs human and non-human access to all of an organization's applications, data, and business processes. Customers trust Saviynt to safeguard their digital assets, drive operational efficiency, and reduce compliance costs. Built for the AI age, Saviynt is today helping organizations safely accelerate their deployment and usage of AI. Saviynt is recognized as the leader in identity security, with solutions that protect and empower the world’s leading brands, Fortune 500 companies and government institutions. For more information, please visit www.saviynt.com.  

Saviynt’s Cloud platform for Identity has a proven track record of helping all Partners standardize and automate the setup and delivery of Identity services to achieve true scalability with their clients. We are passionate that partners and regional model is critical to the success of Saviynt.

Saviynt is currently looking to hire a Partner Director, based out of Sweden, focused on developing and proactively managing the regional GSI and Channel Partner relationships across the Nordics region.

This role will be working collaboratively with the existing Global Partner Organization and our field Sales Directors across Central Europe.

This position will report to the VP of Partners EMEA.

### **WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING**

* Participate in the sales opportunity reviews and reach out and collaborate with the Partner Directors and Field Sales Directors
* Achieve quarterly generation goals for sourced and influenced opportunities
* Use professional judgment to create, analyze and execute lead-generation programs.
* Track relevant sales activities & admin in the sales system to aid in monitoring success and tracking progress.
* Actively participate in the innovation of new techniques and strategies for marketing Saviynt’s products to this Partner set, as well as work closely with the Chief Marketing and Chief Customer Offices.
* Performance reporting and management to regional and global management teams
* Communicate effectively with the Senior Director of the Global Partner Organization

### **WHAT YOU BRING**

* Must be located in Sweden, with relevant regional language skills for the Nordics market
* Minimum 10+ years of Partner experience in the enterprise software industry
* Cyber security and Identity experience is a plus
* Ability to assess current network of Partners and evaluate net-new relationships
* Significant experience working with multiple Partners and varying degree of commitments from a goal-perspective.
* Experienced with Channel partners and/or Global System Integrators
* Experienced in developing and executing a partner program
* Proven track record of quota attainment success exceptional lead generation results
* Experience working in a team environment
* Superior oral and written communication skills

**If required for this role, you will:*** Complete security & privacy literacy and awareness training during onboarding and annually thereafter
* Review (initially and annually thereafter), understand, and adhere to Information Security/Privacy Policies and Procedures such as (but not limited to):

  

> Data Classification, Retention & Handling Policy
> Incident Response Policy/Procedures
> Business Continuity/Disaster Recovery Policy/Procedures
> Mobile Device Policy
> Account Management Policy
> Access Control Policy
> Personnel Security Policy
> Privacy Policy  

Saviynt is an amazing place to work. We are a high-growth, Platform as a Service company focused on Identity Authority to power and protect the world at work. You will experience tremendous growth and learning opportunities through challenging yet rewarding work which directly impacts our customers, all within a welcoming and positive work environment. If you're resilient and enjoy working in a dynamic environment you belong with us! ***Saviynt is an equal opportunity employer and we welcome everyone to our team. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or veteran status.***

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: IAM Engineer/analyst
description:
**Build the Future of Technology with Professional Galaxy AB**


Professional Galaxy AB is an IT and technology consulting company providing highly specialized expertise in IT, software development, SAP, procurement, electronics, and mechanical design. We collaborate with experienced senior experts and deliver strategic, value-driven competence in complex and analytically demanding projects. Our focus is always on high quality, professionalism, and clear, measurable results.

**We are now looking for an IAM Engineer/Analyst**
--------------------------------------------------


The role is positioned as an IAM Engineer/Analyst, focused on delivering technical expertise, platform configuration, and capability improvements within the IAM domain. The emphasis is on hands-on engineering, implementation, troubleshooting, and support activities.

### **Key knowledge areas:**

**Core IAM & Directory Expertise**  

Ensuring secure and reliable identity operations.

**Protocols & Integration Skills**  

Solid understanding of modern authentication standards.

**Automation & Troubleshooting**  

Ability to diagnose authentication, access, and identity platform issues across cloud and on-prem environments.

### **Role responsibilities:**


The IAM Engineer is expected to:

* Work hands-on across core IAM areas such as identity lifecycle automation, authentication, authorization models, IGA workflows, PAM solutions, directory services, and non-human identity management
* Configure, optimize, and maintain IAM platforms and services in alignment with security standards and best practices
* Implement IAM controls, integrations, policies, and automation across the organization
* Collaborate with architects, governance teams, and security stakeholders to translate requirements into technical solutions and configurations
* Contribute technical input to design discussions, capability improvements, and IAM roadmap activities without owning delivery timelines
* Troubleshoot identity-related issues, support incidents, and ensure stability and quality of IAM services

**Assignment Details**
----------------------

* Application deadline: 2026-05-17
* Start date: 2026-05-18
* End date: 2027-05-31

**How to Ap****ply**
--------------------


Are you the right person for this assignment, or do you want to recommend a strong candidate?


Please apply via the Professional Galaxy AB process with:

* Your updated CV
* Your availability to start
* A short motivation describing your suitability, including relevant experience and background

title: Project Manager – Wearable Airbag Electronics Control Unit Development
description:
**Project Manager – Wearable Airbag ECU Development**

**Background**


Autoliv is driving a new era of rider protection by expanding advanced safety solutions beyond traditional airbags to protect more road users in more scenarios. As part of this mission, we are developing the next‑generation Electronic Control Unit (ECU) to enable smarter, faster, and more scalable safety systems. The ECU project Manager will play a pivotal role in delivering this ECU across a broader product portfolio, accelerating integration into new applications and vehicle platforms. This role directly contributes to Autoliv’s purpose: saving more lives through innovation Link.

**MISSION**


Lead and deliver **the Next** **Wearable Airbag Electronics development projects** across the full lifecycle, from product evolution and new generations to industrialization and series production.


The Project Manager is accountable for **planning, cost, quality, risk, and delivery**, ensuring effective coordination between system engineering, electronics, embedded software, mechanics, validation, industrialization, suppliers, and operations.


The role focuses on the **embedded ECU product**, its evolution and deployment in the field, while coordinating interfaces with wearables teams and working very closely with mobile application and cloud and crash detection teams.


**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES**

**Project Ownership & Planning**

* Own ECU development projects covering **product evolutions, new generations, and variants**
* Define and control **project scope, objectives, milestones, and deliverables**
* Build and maintain the **global project plan**, managing dependencies and critical paths
* Manage **project budget and resources** (internal and external)
* Anticipate deviations and drive corrective actions

**Technical & Cross‑Functional Coordination**

* Coordinate all technical contributors:


	+ System & Electronics Engineering, Embedded Software, Crash detection algorithms, Hardware Design, Mechanical Design, Validation & Test, Industrialization & Manufacturing, Mobile App & cloud.
* Ensure product specifications and system architecture are defined, approved, and respected
* Validate **technical trade‑offs** in collaboration with the Lead System & Electronics Engineer  

(cost vs performance, innovation vs risk, short‑term vs long‑term strategy)

**Risk, Safety & Quality Management**

* Identify and manage **technical, industrial, planning, and supply‑chain risks**
* Ensure safety and quality activities are planned and executed:


	+ Functional safety processes, DFMEA / PFMEA, Validation and qualification
* Ensure compliance with internal processes and applicable standards
* Drive escalation and problem resolution on critical issues

**Product Lifecycle & Evolution**

* Manage ECU lifecycle:


	+ New generation development, Production support & Continuous improvement
* Coordinate introduction of new features, electronics changes, and architecture evolutions  

(connectivity, FOTA, security)
* Plan and manage **firmware update (FOTA) deployment** in coordination with system and software teams

**Suppliers & Industrialization**

* Manage relationships with suppliers, manufacturing partners, and external engineering teams
* Support supplier selection and contracting with purchasing
* Ensure supplier deliverables meet technical, planning, and quality expectations
* Coordinate **DFM / DFT** and ensure readiness for prototypes, pre‑series, and series production
* Monitor manufacturing ramp‑up and ensure proper handover to operations

**Reporting & Communication**

* Provide clear, regular project status reporting to management and stakeholders
* Prepare and lead project, milestone, and risk reviews
* Ensure transparent communication and effective decision‑making

**PROFILE**

**Education & Experience**

* Engineering degree or equivalent
* 5+ years’ experience in project management of embedded or mechatronic systems
* Experience in **safety‑critical products** is a strong asset
* Having launched a product is a big plus

**Technical Background**

* Solid understanding of embedded ECU development, system engineering, and electronics/software constraints
* Familiarity with V‑cycle development, quality and safety processes
* Sufficient technical depth to challenge solutions and drive informed trade‑offs

**Skills & Mindset**

* Strong planning, organization, and leadership skills
* Proven experience managing multi‑disciplinary teams and suppliers
* Risk‑ and delivery‑focused, structured, and proactive
* Excellent professional English (written and spoken)

**Start:** ASAP | **Duration:** Long term  

**Scope:** ECU development projects for wearable airbag systems, from evolution to next‑generation platforms

title: Solution Specialist - Onboarding & Customer Support
description:
**About VISIT**


VISIT is a destination tech platform that brings together everything hospitality and experience operators need to be efficient, profitable, and to create guest experiences no one else can.


Our products empower operators across Europe and beyond — from booking and distribution to payments, operations, and guest experience.

**About the Role**


As a Solution Specialist – Onboarding & Customer Support, you are a key point of contact for hotel and lodging customers using BookVisit. You ensure new clients are onboarded smoothly and supported effectively, helping them realize value quickly and continuously. The role sits at the intersection of onboarding, support, and cross-functional collaboration, with direct impact on customer satisfaction and long-term success.

 **What You Will Do**

* Lead the end-to-end onboarding process for new customers, ensuring a smooth and structured implementation of BookVisit
* Configure the platform to align with each client’s operational needs and workflows
* Deliver onboarding sessions and training that enable confident and effective platform usage
* Own customer support interactions across phone, email, and digital meetings, providing timely and high-quality assistance
* Troubleshoot technical and operational issues related to BookVisit, PMS integrations, and connected third-party tools, escalating complex cases when needed
* Document and track support cases accurately in CRM and ticketing systems to ensure traceability and resolution
* Collaborate with Sales, Customer Success, and Product teams to enable seamless handovers and continuous service improvement

 **Who You Are**

* 1–3 years of experience in a customer support, onboarding, or similar client-facing role, preferably within SaaS or the hospitality industry
* Solid understanding of hotel and lodging operations, including booking, front desk, and guest service workflows
* Comfortable working in SaaS environments, with the ability to troubleshoot cloud-based software and technical issues
* Strong verbal and written communication skills in English, with a minimum B1 proficiency level, as well as proficiency in at least one Scandinavian language
* Service-minded and solution-oriented, with strong attention to detail and a proactive approach
* Experience with property management systems (PMS), booking engines, channel managers, or similar hospitality technology is an advantage

 **Why VISIT?**


At VISIT, we value a unique blend of professionalism, curiosity, and passion. We look for people who combine confidence with humility, enjoy solving complex challenges, and are motivated by building sustainable, future-proof solutions for the travel industry.


What you can expect:  

– A culture that supports learning, collaboration, and continuous improvement  

– An international environment with colleagues across more than 10 countries  

– Work that directly contributes to better experiences for operators, partners, and guests  

– A company that strives to be reliable, helpful, and constantly improving — with grit and a smile on our faces

 **Location & Ways of Working**


– Hybrid/remote  

– Primary office location Gothenburg or Stockholm  

– Collaboration with international colleagues is part of the role.

 **Interested?**


We’d love to hear from you!  

Apply now and join us in building the future of destination tech together.

 **About VISIT**


VISIT is a destination tech platform that brings together everything hospitality and experience operators need to be efficient, profitable, and to create guest experiences no one else can.  

  

Founded in 1999 and headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden, VIST Group has grown into a team of 350+ employees across more than 10 countries. We describe ourselves as reliable, helpful, and constantly improving — with grit and a smile on our faces.

title: Product Support Specialist - Malmö
description:
**We are looking for a Product Support Specialist based in Malmö to join our team!**


Spiideo is the leading provider of automated cloud-based solutions for video analysis and streaming of sports. With an entirely new way of recording, sharing, and analyzing sports performance and producing sports for streaming, Spiideo has a unique position in the market. Our solution strikes the perfect balance between performance, simplicity, and accessibility.


Today, Spiideo is used by hundreds of organizations globally across multiple sports (including soccer, basketball and ice hockey), ranging from top-tier leagues such as the English Premier League, MLS, LigaMX, USL and NWSL to youth and collegiate programs worldwide.  

  

**ABOUT THE ROLE**


As a Product Support Specialist, you will play a key role in ensuring our customers get the best possible experience with our products.

**Responsibilities:**

* Answering incoming requests from Spiideo customers and triaging according to our Service Level Agreements
* Act as the first point of contact and advocate for our customers across all products
* Escalate incidents to our Engineering team when needed
* Investigate and replicate bugs, and testing new features
* Collect customer feedback and channel insights back to our product team for improvements
* Take ownership of the customers' support experience from start to finish
* Help manage our league processes to provide a seamless customer experience
* Contribute to delivering a best-in-class support experience

 **Qualifications:**

* A strong interest in helping customers and solving problems
* Ability to work independently and stay on top of things in a fast-paced environment
* Excited to be working in a fast-paced environment, including the option to work on weekends and shifts
* A passion for technology and sports!
* Experience in a customer facing role
* Experience with support and help desk tools such as Intercom, Zendesk or similar is highly valued
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in English
* Additional languages are considered a plus
* Flexibility to work evenings, weekends and peak holiday periods

**What we can offer:**

* A role in a fast-growing sports tech company with a global footprint
* A fun, skilled and highly motivated international team
* The opportunity to work with leading sports organizations and teams around the world
* A modern work environment where we use the latest tools and technologies
* A centrally located office in Malmö – just a short walk from the central station, in a beautiful building with great facilities
* A comprehensive pension and insurance package
* An annual wellness allowance and the opportunity to spend two working hours per week on physical activity

**Availability**

* Availability to work weekdays + occasional evenings and weekends
* Ability to work during holiday periods, including summer and Christmas

**Location:** This is a hybrid position in Malmö, Sweden. You will report to the Support & Operations Team Lead - EU & ROW, based in Malmö.

title: Data Center Inventory & Asset Manager
description:
**Overview**  

As a Microsoft Data Center Inventory & Asset Technician Manager (DIAM), you will lead a team of Inventory & Asset Management technicians responsible for inbound/outbound logistics tasks, inventory cycle audits, and Data Center regulatory compliance activities. You will guide your employees to effectively run warranty processes and data bearing device (DBD) destruction. This opportunity will allow you to model leadership principles, drive focus on accurately and efficiently completing Inventory and Asset Management (IAM) tasks, and work with stakeholders to manage escalations as they arise.


Microsoft’s Cloud Operations & Innovation (CO+I) is the engine that powers our cloud services. As a CO+I DIAM, you will perform a key role in delivering the core infrastructure and foundational technologies for Microsoft's online services including Bing, Office 365, Xbox, OneDrive, and the Microsoft Azure platform. As a group, CO+I is focused on the personal and professional development of all employees and offers training and growth opportunities including Career Rotation Programs, Diversity & Inclusion training and events, and professional certifications.


Our infrastructure is comprised of a large global portfolio of more than 200 Data Centers in 32 countries and millions of servers. Our foundation is built upon and managed by a team of subject matter experts working to support services for more than 1 billion customers and 20 million businesses in over 90 countries worldwide.


With environmental sustainability and optimization at the forefront of our data center design and operations, we continue to grow and evolve as we meet the ever-changing business demands that hold Microsoft as a world-class cloud provider.


Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond.


This position is for **Tuna Campus.**

 **Responsibilities**  

* Accountable for end-to-end people management activities such as recruitment, performance assessments, resource scheduling and regular bi-weekly one-on-one meetings with a team of Logistics Technicians.
* Delivering success through empowerment and accountability by modeling, coaching, and caring while promoting a positive and effective team culture.
* Responsible for overall day-to-day Logistics Operations and ensure inbound and outbound processes are running smoothly and effectively.
* Escalate issues through appropriate channels and follow up on issue resolution, sharing knowledge related to issue resolution with appropriate teams.
* Support the planning, management, and communication of end-to-end project plans with applicable stakeholders and teams.
* Ensure that all issues are documented, tracked, discussed, and resolved with internal and external stakeholders as well as suppliers with consistent and complete communication.
* Comply with established methodologies and approaches to ensure delivery and execution of contracts and purchase orders.
* Complete required safety training, conduct daily safety briefings, and participate in on-site safety committees.
* Ensure logistics technicians and vendor resources comply with all safety procedures (e.g., Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) usage, equipment usage such as forklift, pallet jacks, lifting, ladder etc).
* Promote a culture of safety and empower technicians to act, speak up, and report safety concerns and/or incidents.
* Has pride and a sense of accountability for the service quality, completeness, and resulting customer experience, displaying accountability and ownership of the data center facilities.
* Embody our culture and values.

  

**Qualifications** **Required Qualifications**

* **Proven** year(s) of experience warehouse/supply chain in an information technology (IT) environment, inventory management, retail, warehouse management, logistics, or a related field.
	+ OR equivalent experience.

**Background Check Requirements:**


Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings:

* Microsoft Cloud Background Check: This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud background check upon hire/transfer and every two years thereafter.


While not required, we also look for the following***Preferred Qualifications:***

* **Proven** year(s) of experience in warehouse/supply chain in an information technology (IT) environment, IT, and/or logistics, operating heavy-load movement equipment (e.g., forklift, pallet jacks, chassis lifts) for a large corporation
	+ OR equivalent experience.
* **Good** year(s) of project management experience.
* Certification in American Production and Inventory Control Society (APICS)/Association for Supply Chain Management (ASCM), International Association of Information Technology Asset Managers (IAITAM), Inventory Control, OR equivalent.

  

  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

  

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process**.**

title: Data Center Project Manager
description:
**Overview**  

Join our team as a Microsoft **Data Center Project Manager (DCPM)** and take ownership of planning, coordinating, and delivering data center deployments and site initiatives for one of our campuses in Sweden. In this role, you will manage projects end‑to‑end or as part of larger portfolio initiatives, ensuring site readiness, correct reservations, and successful execution in close partnership with Logistics, IT, Engineering, and Data Center Operations.As a DCPM, you act as the point of accountability for deployment delivery, coordinating dependencies across teams, managing schedules and risks, and ensuring that work is executed safely, compliantly, and on time. You will work closely with Data Center Management and functional partners to drive predictable delivery outcomes while maintaining a strong focus on safety, quality, and service availability.Microsoft’s Cloud Operations & Innovation (CO+I) is the engine that powers our cloud services. As a CO+I DCPM, you play a key role in delivering the core infrastructure and foundational technologies for Microsoft’s online services, including Bing, Office 365, Xbox, OneDrive, and Microsoft Azure.

 **Responsibilities*** **Project & Deployment Ownership**


	+ Plan, coordinate, and deliver data center projects and deployments from initiation through completion, aligned with approved timelines and business priorities.
	+ Own deployment readiness, including cluster reservations, dependency tracking, and alignment across IT, Logistics, Engineering, and Operations teams.
	+ Act as the overall deployment owners, ensuring scope, schedule, risks, and milestones are clearly defined and actively managed.
	+ Drive alignment across multiple workstreams and resolve conflicts or blockers through structured escalation.
	+ Ensure safety requirements, risk assessments, and change management processes are in place and followed for all project activities.
	+ Participate in and lead root cause analysis (RCA) for deployment or project issues, driving corrective and preventive actions.
	+ Ensure projects comply with data center standards, procedures, and operational readiness requirements.
	+ Serve as the primary interface between Data Center Operations, functional teams, and external vendors for assigned projects.
	+ Facilitate clear communication, status reporting, and decision‑making across stakeholders.
	+ Support vendor coordination from a project governance perspective, ensuring scope alignment and delivery readiness.
	+ Share lessons learned and best practices across the campus and broader CO+I organisation.
	+ Embody Microsoft’s culture and values in all interactions.
* Embody our culture and values.

  

**Qualifications** **Required Qualifications:**

* Experience in project management, operations, or infrastructure delivery in a technical or operational environment.
* Strong coordination and stakeholder management skills across cross‑functional teams.
* Proven ability to manage schedules, dependencies, risks, and delivery commitments.
* Excellent communication and organisational skills.
* Ability to work independently, prioritise effectively, and drive outcomes in a dynamic environment.

**Background Check Requirements:**


Ability to meet Microsoft, customer and/or government security screening requirements are required for this role. These requirements include, but are not limited to the following specialized security screenings:

* Microsoft Cloud Background Check: This position will be required to pass the Microsoft Cloud background check upon hire/transfer and every two years thereafter.


While not required, we also look for the following **Preferred Qualifications:**

* Experience working in hyperscale data center environments or large‑scale technical operations.
* Familiarity with Critical Environment infrastructure (UPS, generators, cooling) or physical IT infrastructure (servers, networking, racks, cabling).
* Technical College degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Telecommunications, or a related field.

  

  

This position will be open for a minimum of 5 days, with applications accepted on an ongoing basis until the position is filled.

  

Microsoft is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to age, ancestry, citizenship, color, family or medical care leave, gender identity or expression, genetic information, immigration status, marital status, medical condition, national origin, physical or mental disability, political affiliation, protected veteran or military status, race, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy), sexual orientation, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance with religious accommodations and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application process**.**
