title: Partner Director, Nordics
description:
Saviynt's AI-powered identity platform manages and governs human and non-human access to all of an organization's applications, data, and business processes. Customers trust Saviynt to safeguard their digital assets, drive operational efficiency, and reduce compliance costs. Built for the AI age, Saviynt is today helping organizations safely accelerate their deployment and usage of AI. Saviynt is recognized as the leader in identity security, with solutions that protect and empower the world’s leading brands, Fortune 500 companies and government institutions. For more information, please visit 
 

 www.saviynt.com
 

 .
 




  






 Saviynt’s Cloud platform for Identity has a proven track record of helping all Partners standardize and automate the setup and delivery of Identity services to achieve true scalability with their clients. We are passionate that partners and regional model is critical to the success of Saviynt. 
 



  


  
 


  



 Saviynt is currently looking to hire a Partner Director, based out of Sweden, focused on developing and proactively managing the regional GSI and Channel Partner relationships across the Nordics region.   
 



  


  
 


  



 This role will be working collaboratively with the existing Global Partner Organization and our field Sales Directors across Central Europe. 
 



  


  
 


  



 This position will report to the VP of Partners EMEA.
 



  


  
 




  




**WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING** 
  
* Participate in the sales opportunity reviews and reach out and collaborate with the Partner Directors and Field Sales Directors
  
* Achieve quarterly generation goals for sourced and influenced opportunities
  
* Use professional judgment to create, analyze and execute lead-generation programs
  
* Track relevant sales activities & admin in the sales system to aid in monitoring success and tracking progress
  
* Actively participate in the innovation of new techniques and strategies for marketing  Saviynt’s products to this Partner set, as well as work closely with the Chief Marketing  and Chief Customer Offices.
  
* Performance reporting and management to regional and global management teams
  
* Communicate effectively with the Senior Director of the Global Partner Organization
  

  



  




**WHAT YOU BRING** 
  
* Must be located in Sweden, with relevant regional language skills for the Nordics market
  
* Minimum 10+ years of Partner experience in the enterprise software industry
  
* Cyber security and Identity experience is a plus
  
* Ability to assess current network of Partners and evaluate net-new relationships
  
* Significant experience working with multiple Partners and varying degree of commitments from a goal-perspective.
  
* Experienced with Channel partners and/or Global System Integrators
  
* Experienced in developing and executing a partner program
  
* Proven track record of quota attainment success exceptional lead generation results
  
* Experience working in a team environment
  
* Superior oral and written communication skills
  

  






  




  


**If required for this role, you will:** 




 - Complete security & privacy literacy and awareness training during onboarding and annually thereafter
 



 - Review (initially and annually thereafter), understand, and adhere to Information Security/Privacy Policies and Procedures such as (but not limited to):
 



  





 > Data Classification, Retention & Handling Policy
 



 > Incident Response Policy/Procedures
 



 > Business Continuity/Disaster Recovery Policy/Procedures
 



 > Mobile Device Policy
 



 > Account Management Policy
 



 > Access Control Policy
 



 > Personnel Security Policy
 



 > Privacy Policy
 



  






 Saviynt is an amazing place to work. We are a high-growth, Platform as a Service company focused on Identity Authority to power and protect the world at work. You will experience tremendous growth and learning opportunities through challenging yet rewarding work which directly impacts our customers, all within a welcoming and positive work environment. If you're resilient and enjoy working in a dynamic environment you belong with us!
 




  





***Saviynt is an equal opportunity employer and we welcome everyone to our team.  All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or veteran status.
   


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.***

title: Infrastructure Engineer
description:
Are you looking for an opportunity to be part of Crypto and Key Management team to protect the transactions, secure the infrastructure and make a difference?
   

  

 In Swedbank you have the opportunity to:
   

  

* Work in a large and complex finance infrastructure.
* Co-operate closely with team members in managing and maintaining solutions for customer security.
* Maintain excellent quality of service in the area.
* Protect our Cloud journey using its security solutions to deliver value based on Product area roadmap.
* Provide input to architectural roadmaps and improve standards and guidelines.
* Be an important success factor for the bank and for your career.


 What is needed in this role:
   

  

 This role requires a wide variety of strengths and capabilities, including:
   

  

* Experience with cryptographic services.
* Experience integrating and/or operating enterprise cryptographic solutions including PKI, HSMs and other key management platforms.
* Knowledge of installation and configuration of HSMs (payShield, nShield, IBM TKE, Atalla HSMs).
* Expertise in application, data and infrastructure administration.
* Knowledge of industry wide technology trends and best practices.
* Bachelor’s or master’s degree in IT or a related field
* Continuously update existing, mandatory documentation for the services.
* Resolve incidents, fix bugs, mitigate vulnerabilities and irradicate deficiencies.
* Maintain Crypto and Key management processes and meet compliance requirements.
* Fluency in English and Swedish both written and spoken.


**Preferred experience in one or more of the following:**
* Working within an agile development methodology (Kanban, Scrum, etc).
* Understanding of cryptography and key management.
* Mainframe skills are beneficial.
* Experience utilizing and deploying cryptographic technologies such as, PGP, PKI, and HSM.
* Knowledge and experience of network and system security solutions, concepts, and technologies.
* Experience with platforms such as Linux and/or Windows.


 With us, you can experience:
   

  

* Personal and professional growth through self-leadership and continuous development.
* Meaningful work that positively impacts our workplace, our customers, and society.
* An open and collaborative culture that encourages cross-functional teamwork and provides networking opportunities.
* A supportive and inclusive environment that promotes a balanced and sustainable work-life, with flexible working conditions when suitable for the role.
* Benefits such as our share based reward program Eken, company pension plan, employee offer for banking products, health insurance.


 "Join our team and...
   

  

 become part of an international team of professional colleagues, who work together to deliver challenging projects, maximize customer satisfaction and contribute to Swedbank's position in society."
 **Rasha Hana, your future manager**
 We look forward to receiving your application by 30.04.2026.
   

  

**Location:Stockholm, Sundbyberg**
**Recruiting manager: Rasha Hana**
 We may begin the selection during the application period, so we welcome your application as soon as possible.
   

  

*We have made our choice regarding recruitment media and therefore kindly decline contact with ad sellers or sellers of other recruitment services.*
**Swedbank does not discriminate anybody based on gender, age, sexual orientation or sexual identity, ethnicity, religion or disability – everybody is welcome.**

title: ZTNA Platform Technician
description:
**Vi söker en driven och erfaren ZTNA Platform Technician** 
 som vill vara med och vidareutveckla och drifta en modern Zero Trust Network Access‑miljö. I denna roll får du en nyckelposition i att säkerställa säker digital åtkomst, ersätta traditionella VPN‑lösningar och bidra till införandet av moderna Zero Trust‑principer inom organisationen.
 



  





 Om rollen
 



 Som ZTNA Platform Technician arbetar du nära IAM‑, säkerhets‑ och infrastrukturteam för att implementera och förvalta skalbara och säkra åtkomstlösningar. Du blir en viktig del i arbetet med att analysera åtkomstmönster, utforma policyer och kontinuerligt höja säkerhetsnivån i linje med Zero Trust‑ramverket.
 



  





 Arbetsuppgifter
 


* Säkerställa säkra konfigurationer för
 **Private Access** 
 och
 **Internet Access**
* Utforma, skriva och konfigurera åtkomstpolicyer, gärna med
 **Policy as Code**
* Förvalta, drifta och vidareutveckla ZTNA‑plattformar
* Delta i migrering från traditionell VPN‑baserad åtkomst till ZTNA
* Analysera åtkomstmönster och rekommendera enforcement‑strategier i linje med Zero Trust
* Implementera och hantera ZTNA‑lösningar i samarbete med IAM‑ och infrastrukturteam
* Utföra schemalagt underhåll, incidenthantering samt compliance‑ och säkerhetsgranskningar



  





 Din profil
 



 Vi söker dig som har ett starkt säkerhetsfokus och god teknisk förståelse.
 



**Vi ser gärna att du har:** 



* God förståelse för
 **Zero Trust‑arkitektur** 
 och dess grundpelare
* Erfarenhet av
 **ZTNA** 
 ,
 **SSE** 
 och/eller
 **SASE‑plattformar**
* Bakgrund inom ett eller flera områden inom cybersäkerhet
* Erfarenhet av skriptning och
 **Configuration / Infrastructure as Code**
* Kännedom om
 **DevSecOps‑arbetssätt** 
 och integrationer
* Goda kunskaper inom nätverk, t.ex.
 **TCP/IP, DNS/DHCP och brandväggar**



 Vi är öppna för konsulter med
 **högre erfarenhetsnivå** 
 som kan bidra med både tekniskt djup och strategiskt perspektiv.
 



  





 Uppdragsinformation
 


* Omfattning: 100 %
* Start: 1 november 2025
* Slut: 30 september 2026 (med möjlighet till förlängning)



 Placeringsort: Stockholm, Göteborg, Linköping eller Malmö

title: Senior Vice President of Engineering
description:
Axiomatics is on a unique journey. Recently becoming part of Leonardo S.p.A, the company now combines the speed and innovation of a modern tech organization with the backing of a large, global industrial group. This creates a rare opportunity: to build and scale a world-class engineering organization within a company that sits at the intersection of cutting-edge technology and mission-critical systems. We are now looking for an
 **SVP of Engineering** 
 to take ownership of this journey.
 



  





**The role** 




 This is not a role for someone who wants to maintain the status quo. You will step into a position where you:
 


* Lead a distributed engineering organization of currently 25 engineers
* Build and scale a new engineering hub in Stockholm
* Act as a bridge between agile product development and more structured, enterprise-driven requirements
* Partner closely with Product and executive leadership to drive delivery, quality, and long-term scalability



  





 You will report directly to the CEO and work closely with the CTO and founders based in Stockholm.
 



  





**What you’ll actually do** 




 Your mission is to create clarity, structure, and momentum in a growing and distributed engineering organization.
 



  





**Building & leading the organization** 



* Take full ownership of the engineering organization and processes (35 people)
* Build and grow the Stockholm engineering team from the ground up
* Drive hiring, team structure, and capability development



  





**Driving execution & delivery** 



* Ensure predictable, high-quality delivery aligned with the product roadmap
* Improve planning, estimation, and accountability across teams
* Challenge assumptions and push for higher productivity where needed



  





**Establishing modern ways of working** 



* Balance agile development with more structured processes required by enterprise and government customers
* Introduce scalable engineering practices (CI/CD, DevEx, observability, automation)
* Create a culture of ownership, quality, and continuous improvement



  





**Shaping the future platform** 



* Contribute to the evolution of a modern, AI-first authorization platform
* Explore how AI can improve both product capabilities and internal engineering efficiency
* Ensure systems are scalable, secure, and enterprise-ready



  





**The context** 




 Axiomatics operates in a complex but exciting environment:
 


* A globally distributed team with strong engineering presence in Greece, and leadership across Europe and India
* A product landscape transitioning from legacy to modern platform architecture
* A company culture that is modern and engineering-driven, now evolving to meet the expectations of a larger industrial owner



  





**This means you’ll need to navigate:** 



* Agility vs structure
* Speed vs predictability
* Innovation vs compliance



  





**Who you are** 




 You are a builder and a pragmatic leader. You know how to create structure without slowing things down—and you’re not afraid to challenge teams when needed.
 



  





**You likely bring:** 



* Experience leading engineering organizations of 30+ people
* A strong technical background (ideally Java-based environments, cloud, DevOps, distributed systems)
* Experience from B2B or enterprise software
* A track record of scaling teams and improving delivery in complex environments
* Comfort working across geographies and cultures



  





**It’s a big plus if you have experience in:** 



* Security and preferably Identity and Access Management (IAM)
* AI/ML-driven development or AI-assisted engineering workflows



  





**Just as importantly, you are:** 



* Pragmatic and execution-focused
* Comfortable holding teams accountable
* Able to navigate between different stakeholders, cultures, and expectations
* A leader who brings both structure and momentum



  





**Why this role** 



* Build something from the ground up in Stockholm while leading an existing international team
* Operate in a space where data, security, and AI meet real-world, mission-critical use cases
* Be part of a company that combines startup DNA with the backing of a global industrial group
* Have real impact on how engineering is structured, how teams work, and how products are delivered



  





**Practical details** 



* Location: Stockholm (with international collaboration and some travel, primarily to Greece and Italy)
* Hybrid setup with strong emphasis on leadership presence
* English is the working language



  





 If you’re motivated by building, scaling, and bringing structure to complexity—this is a role where you can have real impact.
 



  





*Aximatics is partnering with Safemind for this recruitment process.*

title: Data Engineer
description:
Join EQT as a Data Engineer in the Client Tech Value Stream, where you will build and scale our modern data platform. You will work across the full data lifecycle, enabling reliable, high-quality data products that support decision-making across the business.
   

  

**About The Client Tech Value Stream Team**
 The Client Tech Value Stream focuses on delivering technology and data solutions that support client, investor, and fund-related processes. The team works closely with engineering, product, CRM, and business stakeholders to build scalable platforms that enable insights and operational efficiency across EQT.
   

  

**About The Role**
 You will play a key role in designing, building, and operating EQT’s cloud-based data platform. You will work across ingestion, transformation, and data modeling to ensure high-quality, reliable, and accessible data.
   

  

* Design, build, and operate scalable data pipelines across multiple data sources.
* Ingest data from APIs, external platforms, Fivetran connectors, and cloud storage.
* Develop and maintain data models using dbt on Snowflake.
* Structure data around core business entities such as clients, investors, funds, and transactions.
* Enable analytics and reporting in tools such as Power BI, Salesforce CRM Analytics, Tableau and our AI stack.
* Monitor and troubleshoot pipelines to ensure reliability and performance.
* Collaborate with stakeholders across engineering, analytics, CRM, and business teams.
* Contribute to platform improvements and modernization of legacy pipelines.
* Support infrastructure and access management using GitHub, Terraform, and Snowflake.


**About You**
 You are an experienced Data Engineer who enjoys working across the full data stack and collaborating with diverse teams. You are comfortable working in a modern cloud environment and translating business needs into scalable data solutions. You are curious about AI and new technology, and can translate both human and machine needs into code.
   

  

**Essential skills and experience:**
* Experience building data pipelines and working with cloud data platforms.
* Experience collaborating with nontechnical stakeholders for requirements and maintenance.
* Strong SQL skills and experience with data modeling for usage by reporting tools and LLM models.
* Experience with Snowflake and dbt or similar tools.
* Experience integrating data from multiple systems such as APIs and SaaS platforms.
* Familiarity with data visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
* Experience with version control and infrastructure tools such as Git and Terraform.


**Nice to have:**
* Experience with GCP and Fivetran.
* Experience working with CRM systems such as Salesforce.
* Understanding of financial or private markets data.


**What We Offer**
 You will be part of a collaborative and forward-looking team where data is central to how EQT creates value. We offer opportunities to work with modern technologies, contribute to impactful projects, and grow your skills in a global environment.
   

  

**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
*Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.*
**About EQT**
*EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of over three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 270 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌141 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.*
*More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram*

title: Manager, Deployment Strategy and Growth
description:
We're building the unified customer platform for growing lifelong revenue. Planhat is where data meets action. We bring sales, service, and success teams together in one system that combines enterprise-grade power with consumer-ready simplicity. Data is architected for execution. AI is commercially rooted. And the entire customer journey lives in one place. What started with two people and no funding has grown into a 200-strong team powering thousands of teams globally.
   

  

 Our pace is high, our standards are higher, and the opportunity to grow is unmatched. You'll be trusted early, challenged constantly, and surrounded by people who approach their work with the same intensity you do. We're ambitious, we work with our equals, and we're building the customer platform that defines the next era of B2B.
   

  

 As a Manager in the Deployment Strategy and Growth team you'll own revenue outcomes for a portfolio of strategic customers. You'll work at the intersection of product adoption, customer insight, and commercial execution, driving the retention and expansion decisions that determine long-term business success.
   

  

 This isn’t traditional account management. You’ll own NRR targets, identify and capture expansion opportunities, and be accountable for revenue retained and grown. As a trusted advisor to revenue leaders, you’ll help them translate strategy into measurable outcomes while strengthening the commercial muscle that defines great commerical teams.
   

  

**You will:**
* Own commercial outcomes end-to-end: Manage customers from onboarding through renewal and expansion. Drive retention, maximize NRR, and be accountable for growing your portfolio's revenue.
* Deliver measurable customer outcomes: Aligning your strategy to either revenue expansion or operational efficiency, then delivering measurable outcomes that support that goal. Partner with customers to define impactful success metrics, develop actionable execution plans, and systematically track progress. Drive product adoption as the foundation for creating long-term value and sustainable revenue growth.
* Identify opportunities proactively: Analyze usage patterns, engagement signals, and customer health data to uncover expansion opportunities, mitigate churn risks, and execute targeted account strategies.
* Inform product and go-to-market strategy: Your direct customer engagement provides critical insight into product performance and market needs. Your feedback will shape product roadmap priorities and commercial strategy.


 Our team comes from diverse backgrounds, the common denominator is drive and ambition.
   

  

 Perhaps you've spent a minimum of 3-5 years in high-performance environments like management consulting or a fast-growth start-up, where clear thinking, fast execution, and accountability to outcomes were non-negotiable. Or perhaps, you have previously been a CS leader and are now looking to bring your expertise to others.
   

  

 You've been consistently promoted and entrusted with increasing responsibility - bonus points if that includes management or revenue ownership. You bring strong business acumen and genuine curiosity about AI and the SaaS landscape. You have a winner's mentality, with a track record in competitive sports, academics, or other arenas that proves you're top talent who rises to every challenge. You're now ready to channel that drive into customer growth and revenue ownership.
   

  

 You'll thrive here if you are:
   

  

* Commercially focused: You think in terms of revenue and business outcomes. You understand what drives results and can engage with senior stakeholders on the metrics and strategies that impact their bottom line.
* Comfortable owning the full outcome: You take ownership of whether customers achieve their goals. You connect product adoption to measurable business impact and view customer outcomes as a direct reflection of your work.
* Self-directed and adaptable: You take initiative without waiting for direction, learn quickly, and maintain momentum in ambiguous situations. You thrive when given autonomy and accountability.
* Tech-savvy curiosity: You’re naturally interested in how technology and AI can create leverage, improve decisions, and shape new ways of working. You stay curious about innovation and how it can drive better business results.
* Highly ambitious: You set challenging goals and execute with urgency. You're driven by growth for both your customers and yourself, and are motivated by environments where performance matters.


 The ones who succeed in this role are becoming the leaders of the next decade. They own the revenue, stay closest to the customer, and deliver the outcomes that matter most. If that trajectory excites you, we'd love to connect.

title: Domain Architect (Vmware vSphere & vCen)
description:
**(This position is based in Sweden. Applicants must be currently residing in Sweden, either as Swedish citizens or with a valid Resident work permit. Please note that visa sponsorship is not available for this role)** 




  





 Job Title: Domain Architect - Vmware vSphere & vCen
 



 Type of job: Contract (06 months - Can be Extendable)
 



 Location: Stockholm, Sweden (Hybrid)
 



  





 Job Description:
 



 The Domain Technical Architect plays a crucial role in conceptualizing, designing, and delivering high-quality solutions in VMware technologies. This position emphasizes strategic technical direction and architectural leadership, ensuring that products and sustenance deliveries are aligned with organizational standards and client requirements. The architect is responsible for guiding and developing the team, enhancing their skills, and mitigating delivery risks associated with VMware vSphere, vSAN, and related technologies. (1.) Key Responsibilities
 



 1. Architect And Design Robust Solutions Utilizing Vmware Vsphere And Vcenter To Ensure High-Performance And Scalable Infrastructure That Meets Product Delivery Requirements.
 



 2. Implement And Oversee Vmware Vsan Solutions To Optimize Storage Performance And Efficiency While Ensuring Data Integrity And Availability.
 



 3. Conduct Training Sessions To Develop The Team S Expertise In Vmware Technologies, Ensuring A Skilled Workforce Capable Of Meeting Project Demands And Mitigating Delivery Risks.
 



 4. Collaborate With Stakeholders To Gather Comprehensive Specifications And Deliver Tailored Solutions That Align With Client Needs And Industry Standards.
 



 5. Stay Current With Emerging Technologies And Best Practices In Sddc And Aria Monitoring Tools, Ensuring That The Solutions Designed Meet Quality Standards And Enhance Operational Efficiency.
 



  





 Skill Requirements
 



 1. In-Depth Knowledge Of Vmware Vsphere And Vcenter
 



 2. Proficiency In Vmware Vsan And Srm
 



 3. Strong Understanding Of Sddc And Aria Monitoring Tools
 



 4. Excellent Architectural Design And Solution Delivery Skills
 



 5. Ability To Conduct Effective Training And Knowledge Transfer Sessions
 



  





 Certification
