title: Plattformsutvecklare för strömmad data
description:
*Vill du bygga fundamentet för ett eventdrivet Avanza? Som Plattformsutvecklare skapar du förutsättningarna för våra autonoma team genom modern molninfrastruktur, Data Mesh och en passion för arkitektur. Här får du mandatet att forma den plattform som driver allt från handelsflöden i realtid till nästa generations kundupplevelse.*
 Om teamet och rollen
   

  

 Team Data Distribution är ett plattformsteam med ansvar att utveckla Event Driven Architecture som möjliggör våra mikrotjänster. Vi servar över 40 produktteam, med en distribuerad strömningsplattform baserad på Kafka. Komponenten är verksamhetskritisk för allt från orderläggning och handelsflöden i realtid till uppdateringar av kontosaldon och notifieringar.
   

  

 På Avanza är våra produktteam autonoma och därför arbetar vi utifrån Data Mesh- ramverket där self-service och domain ownership är våra ledstjärnor. Det som gjort oss framgångsrika genom åren är att vi ser plattformen som en produkt (Platform as a Product), med en tydlig produktroadmap och en nära relation till våra användare där vi ständigt utforskar deras behov, genom bl.a. användarintervjuer och demos. Vi jobbar datadrivet och mäter våra kollegors användning av plattformen, i syfte att ständigt underlätta deras vardag.
   

  

 För stunden är vi på god väg att lämna våra egen hostade Kafka-kluster till förmån för Confluent Cloud, där effekten för oss blir mindre fokus på drift och mer utforskande av nya tekniker samt mer tid till en förbättrad developer experience.
   

  

 Team Data Distributions mission är: Göra det enkelt att kommunicera eventdrivet i distribuerade system samt att tillgängliggöra och förädla strömmande data.
   

  

**Hos Oss Kommer Du Att**
* Utveckla och underhålla plattform för eventdriven kommunikation
* Sätta standarder och mönster för hur produktteamen konsumerar data i realtid
* Hjälpa andra team genom att utbilda i best practices kring event driven architecture
* Utvärdera och implementera nästa generations verktyg inom strömmande data
* Jobba med tekniker som Kafka, GCP, Terraform, Confluent Cloud


**Din Profil**
 För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du är en senior utvecklare som älskar Java, men som också har lyft blicken för att bemästra applikationsarkitektur i sin helhet. Du har praktisk erfarenhet av Event Driven Architecture och trivs i miljöer där händelsestyrda flöden står i centrum. Som person är du prestigelös och hjälpsam – ditt starka service mindset gör att du naturligt stöttar teamet och bidrar till en positiv, samarbetande arbetskultur.
   

  

**Kvalifikationer**
* Bekväm med Infrastructure as Code (t.ex. Terraform eller liknande)
* Förmåga att göra komplexa saker enkla – för dig själv och för andra
* Har erfarenhet av att jobba i molnplattform (AWS/Azure/GCP)
* Erfarenhet av Spring Framework.
* Erfarenhet av distribuerade system


**Det Är Meriterande Om Du**
* Jobbat med Kafka eller utvecklat plattform för strömmad data
* Jobbat som plattformsutvecklare
* Byggt realtidsanalys på strömmande data


 Ansökan
   

  

 Skicka in din ansökan via "Ansök nu"-knappen i annonsen. Urval sker löpande, så vänta inte med att söka. Vi ser fram emot att höra från dig!
   

  

 Har du frågor om tjänsten? Kontakta Engineering Manager Afram Kourie på afram.kourie@avanza.se
   

  

 Vi undanber oss vänligen men bestämt kontakt från rekryteringsföretag och annonssäljare.
   

  

 Avanza är Sveriges ledande plattform för sparande och placeringar. Vi drivs av att förändra branschen genom att utmana de stora bankerna och försäkringsbolagen på den svenska sparmarknaden. Vi vill vara tjänsten som förenklar och förbättrar spararnas ekonomi, oavsett om man älskar aktier eller bara vill ha ett bra sparande. Vår vision är att skapa en bättre framtid för miljoner människor. Därför står våra kunders bästa alltid i fokus, precis som det borde vara. Affärsidén är enkel – mer till dig, mindre till banken. En idé som gett oss Sveriges nöjdaste sparare 15 år i rad.

title: Chief Technology Officer (confidential)
description:
**Our client is a fast-growing B2B SaaS company based in Stockholm** 
 with a strong international customer base. Their platform processes large volumes of structured and unstructured data, helping organizations turn it into reliable, actionable insights. Backed by leading European investors, they are now building the next chapter of their technical vision.
 



  





**The Role** 




 As their Chief Technology Officer, you will define and drive the technical vision and strategy for the company. This is a hands-on technical leadership position — you will shape the architecture, stay close to the details, and set the standard for technical quality across the organization.
 



 The core challenge is not just scale — it is ensuring data quality and consistency in a fast-moving, high-volume environment.
 



  





 The company is evolving a scalable data-first SaaS platform toward deeper AI-driven capabilities. This means building agentic workflows, AI-first product experiences, and changing how the engineering organization itself works with AI. The incoming CTO will own this end-to-end.
 



  





 You will lead an engineering organization of 50-70 engineers, led through a team of Engineering Managers, and report directly to the CEO. You will work closely with product, design, and data science.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 



* Own the technical strategy and architecture for the data platform
* Drive the shift towards agentic architecture and AI-native product experiences
* Build and develop a world-class engineering organization
* Embed AI-first development practices across engineering teams
* Stay hands-on — architecture reviews, key technical decisions, complex problem-solving
* Work closely with product and design to turn business vision into technical reality



  





**What They’re Looking For** 



* Hands-on experience building distributed data systems at scale in production
* Real fluency in agentic AI — you’ve built it, not just read about it
* Technical credibility that senior engineers respect
* A track record of building and leading high-performing teams



  





**Nice to have:** 



* Deep knowledge of modern open source data infrastructure
* Background in data science or machine learning
* Experience from a data-intensive domain — data-intensive SaaS or enterprise software
* Experience building AI-native products in an early-stage environment — as a founder or early technical leader



  





*Confidential recruitment assignment managed by Safemind Executive.*

title: Solution Sales Specialist OT
description:
**Do you want to be at the forefront of protecting our society against cyber threats? We are looking for an experienced and driven Solution Sales Specialist OT to join our dynamic team. You will play a key role in expanding our footprint in the OT security (Operational Technology) domain.**
**About Truesec – A Leading Cybersecurity Company**
 Since 2005, Truesec has been a native cybersecurity company, driven by one single purpose: Creating safety and sustainability in a digital world by preventing cyber breach and minimizing impact.
   

  

 Over the years, we’ve earned the trust of organizations worldwide and gained a strong reputation internationally. Our team consists of dedicated specialists covering the entire spectrum of cybersecurity – with capabilities in Predict, Prevent, Protect, Respond, and Recover.
   

  

 Today, we are around 400 employees – and as cybercrime grows, we need to grow. To support that goal, we are now looking for an Solution Sales Specialist OT to join our dynamic team. You will play a key role in expanding our footprint in the OT (Operational Technology) domain, helping organizations secure their critical infrastructure and digital assets.
   

  

**The Role**
 As an OT Solution Sales Specialist at Truesec, you will play a key role in building and growing our OT Security offering – an area where we see strong potential to make a real difference for our customers and for society. As OT environments become increasingly exposed to cyber threats, this role combines technical expertise, customer dialogue, and strategic solution development.
   

  

 You will work closely with customers to understand their OT risks and business needs, acting as a trusted technical advisor throughout the sales process. Together with colleagues across Managed Services, Professional Services, and Incident Response, you will design and position OT Security solutions that are both technically sound and commercially relevant. A central part of the role is translating complex OT and cyber risks into clear, business‑relevant solutions.
   

  

 This is not a role focused on selling a fixed portfolio. You will actively help shape and mature Truesec’s OT Security solution area over time, participating in bids, proposals, and complex customer cases. You will also contribute to how our OT Security offering is positioned externally, including go‑to‑market initiatives and branding. The role reports to the Head of Solution Sales and Bid Management and offers significant influence, responsibility, and strong support from experienced colleagues across Truesec.
   

  

**Your Potential Background**
 You have experience working in or close to Operational Technology environments and a solid understanding of cybersecurity, preferably in industrial, critical, or complex settings. Your background may include network security or industrial network architectures, and you have likely been involved in driving or delivering cybersecurity initiatives within manufacturing, production, critical infrastructure, or other industrial environments.
   

  

 You combine strong technical competence with a commercial mindset and are comfortable in customer‑facing roles. You are confident discussing both technical details and business impact, and you understand how to align security solutions with customer needs. As a person, you are driven, curious, and collaborative, motivated by building something long‑term rather than selling a finished offering. You build trust in customer interactions and share Truesec’s ambition to protect society’s most critic
   

  

*Due to the sensitivity in our assignments, we require Swedish citizenship, citizenship in an EU country, or a Swedish work permit.*
**Join Our Mission Toward a Safe Digital Future**
 If you truly want to make a difference and make our world a little bit safer, this is the place for you. At Truesec, you'll get to be at the forefront of fighting cybercrime instead of reading about it in the news. This is your chance to be part of an exciting journey in a leading cybersecurity company - and learn from some of the best in their field.
   

  

 So, are you ready to team up with the most dedicated team of experts and be part of a meaningful mission? Then we are excited to get to know you!

title: Director, Sales - Public Sector
description:
**Company Description**
 It all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.
   

  

**Job Description**
**What you get to do in this role:**
* Build a team of direct Sales Executives to drive rapid new business sales growth within Public Sector in the region
* Build and drive sales strategy for the region in conjunction with Sales Operations to effectively Go-To-Market including understanding the competitive landscape, presence and strength within the region
* Actively engage in territory planning, relationship development and opportunity development and driving revenue by supporting and assisting Field Sales Teams in closing opportunities
* Recruit, coach and mentor team members to drive excellence
* Development of territories and quota for the sales team and effectively communicate to set performance expectations within the team
* Manage and report accurate forecast and pipeline to the business
* Achievement of annual sales goals on a quarterly and annual basis is required
* Engage and align effectively in C-level meetings in order to properly understand customer business requirements
* Build effective working relationships with Solution Consulting, Business Units, Professional Services, Marketing, our Partner community and the ServiceNow executive team
* Retain and grow existing customer base with regular non-sales customer engagement activities to deliver an excellent customer experience


**Qualifications**
**To be successful in this role you have:**
* Experience in leveraging or critically thinking about how to integrate AI into work processes, decision-making, or problem-solving. This may include using AI-powered tools, automating workflows, analyzing AI-driven insights, or exploring AI's potential impact on the function or industry.
* Extensive track record of new business sales success including presentation and negotiation skills within Public Sector and at C Level
* Strong success in recruiting, coaching and managing an exceptional sales team
* Strong strategic thinking including analytical and financial planning skills to meet and exceed quotas and goals.
* Ownership of accurate CRM reports including current and future quarterly forecasts and opportunity inspection
* Experienced in driving sales process and drive effective working relationships with Sales Operations
* Ability to understand the 'bigger picture' and business drivers around IT
* Ability to build long term strategic and senior level relationships
* Ability to adapt and work effectively within a rapidly changing and growing environment
* Demonstrates strong business and financial acumen
* Built self-motivated sales teams that embrace a culture of collaboration, enthusiasm, and overachievement
* Champions and promotes top performers, constantly develops and coaches the team and themselves, and topgrades appropriately
* Proven partner relationships and networks, and ability to grow the impact of revenue streams and territory development through the partner ecosystem
* Ownership of driving successful pipeline generation activities developed by marketing or the partner community
* Fluency in English and Swedish


 Additional Information
   

  

**Work Personas**
 We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third-party service.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.
   

  

**Accommodations**
 We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.
   

  

**Export Control Regulations**
 For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.
   

  

 From Fortune. ©2025 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.

title: Network Automation Consultant
description:
Hallå där! Vill du jobba med det senaste inom nätverk? Vill du vara med och forma framtidens nätverk och automation? Vi på Telia Cygate söker en
 **Network Automation Consultant** 
 som vill bli en del av vårt fantastiska team och arbeta med några av Sveriges mest spännande IT-miljöer.
   

  

 Jag heter Solveig Jagelid och leder vårt spännande konsultteam
 **Networking & Hybrid IT i Region Öst.** 
 Nu söker jag dig som har erfarenhet av nätverkslösningar och automation – och som brinner för att skapa värde nära kund. Hos oss får du möjlighet att växa, certifiera dig och vara med på en spännande resa där innovation och kundnytta står i centrum.
   

  

**Vad du kommer att göra i rollen:**
 Som Nätverks- och automationskonsult blir du en nyckelperson i våra kundprojekt. Du kommer att:
   

  

* Planera och designa avancerade nätverks- och säkerhetslösningar med fokus på automation och integration.
* Installera, konfigurera och felsöka komplexa IT-miljöer hos några av Sveriges största företag.
* Självständigt arbete nära kund, med stort ansvar och frihet.
* Samarbeta med experter inom nätverk, säkerhet och hybrid IT – och få insikt i de senaste teknologierna inom Cloud, Security och Automation.


**För att lyckas i rollen:**
 Som person motiveras du av att skapa förändring och har en förmåga att engagera kunder såväl som dina kollegor. Du kommer särskilt till din rätt när du får ge utlopp för tankar och idéer där du använder din verksamhetsförståelse för att omsätta krav till genomförbara lösningar. Förutom det får du tillhöra en växande organisation som uppmuntrar dig på din egen utvecklingsresa; varför inte certifiera dig med oss och utforska det senaste som ex. Aruba, Fortinet, Cisco och automation.
   

  

* Flera års erfarenhet inom nätverksteknik eller liknande.
* Djupa kunskaper inom Routing och Switching.
* Erfarenhet av automation (t.ex. Python, NetBox).
* Certifieringar inom Aruba, Cisco och/eller Fortinet – starkt meriterande.
* Flytande svenska och engelska, i både tal och skrift.


**Varför Telia Cygate?**
 På Telia Cygate är vi inte bara experter på nätverk, säkerhet och olika slags moln – vi är också ett gäng som tycker att det ska vara kul att gå till jobbet!
   

  

 Som en del av Telia Company har vi styrkan att skapa verklig påverkan i stor skala, bidra till samhällsnytta och hjälpa våra kunder att navigera i digitaliseringens värld. Vi gör det alltid med värme, omtanke och ett leende. Här är det idéerna och våra olika perspektiv som gör oss starka, och tillsammans ser vi till att teknikens värld blir en plats där alla trivs – och där du hör hemma.
   

  

 Hos oss är din utveckling viktig. Vi uppmuntrar till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och ser till att just du och dina intressen är i fokus. Vi vet att det är människorna som utgör vårt företag, och därför värdesätter vi glädje, kreativitet och olika perspektiv i allt vi gör.
   

  

 Välkommen att växa tillsammans med oss, där vi gör teknik mänsklig och skapar verklig påverkan
 **!**
**Telia Cygate är stolta över att vara certifierade som Great Place to Work!**
 Hos oss står människor i centrum – här får du utvecklas, utmanas och trivas tillsammans med engagerade kollegor. Vi bygger en kultur där trygghet, gemenskap och möjligheter går hand i hand. Vill du vara med på resan? Välkommen till en arbetsplats som verkligen gör skäl för namnet.
   

  

**ad vi erbjuder**
 När du börjar hos oss får du en fantastisk möjlighet att utvecklas, omfattande förmånspaket, möjlighet till hybridarbete och mer. Du har också chans att få bonus baserat på din prestation och Telia Cygates resultat.
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan senast
 **2026-05-31.** 
 Rollen kan komma att stängas tidigare om vi hittar rätt kandidat – så vänta inte för länge!
   

  

**Placeringsort:** 
 Solna, Stockholm
   

  

 Om du går vidare i processen kommer du att kontaktas av vår
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Bakgrund- och referenskontroller ingår i processen.
   

  

 Vill du veta mer om rollen? Kontakta gärna Solveig Jagelid på solveig.jagelid@cygate.se.
   

  

**Lika möjligheter för alla**
 På Telia värderar vi kompetens och utvecklingspotential. Vi främjar mångfald och ser till att varje individs behov tillgodoses, oavsett funktionsvariation, kön, ålder, nationalitet, sexuell läggning eller social bakgrund. Tillsammans skapar vi en inkluderande arbetsmiljö där din unikhet är vår styrka.
   

  

**Välkommen till Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Media Solutions Engineer (Paid Search/SEM)
description:
At Precis, we are a group of friendly experts in media buying, analytics & marketing science, creative and technology with a joint mission to help great companies thrive in the digital landscape.
   

  

 Are you curious to learn more about us? Read more about us here. For insights into what life is like at Precis and a peek at the perks of working with us, visit this page. In our Handbook, you can get a neat summary of who we are, our culture and our offices. In this document, we have summarised what our recruitment process looks like. Take a look!
   

  

*We are committed to building an inclusive and fair workplace that attracts talent and advances its people, regardless of their background, experiences or perspectives. We believe that a diverse set of minds will continue to contribute to our innovative culture and our ability to reinvent ourselves constantly.*
**Role Overview**
 The Media Solutions Engineer (MSE) is a critical hybrid role that operates at the intersection of media strategy, business acumen, and technical development. This position is responsible for designing, building, and deploying custom, robust technical solutions that directly enhance client media performance and secure long-term agency partnership ("stickiness"). The MSE transforms complex media challenges into scalable, code-based automations and integrations.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing 💼**
* Innovation-led Strategy: Lead the development of technical solutions that combine deep SEM expertise with programming to solve complex channel challenges and drive performance innovation.
* Advanced Tooling & Automation: Build and maintain high-impact tools that automate repetitive workflows and enable sophisticated search strategies at scale.
* Data Architecture & Integration: Architect and implement robust integrations between core platforms (Google Ads) and client data environments (BigQuery) to enable advanced functionality.
* Rapid Prototyping: Transition quickly from concept to code, developing working prototypes, such as a return-rate prediction model or inventory bidding strategies to address immediate client needs and test new SEM hypotheses.
* Technical Auditing & Performance: Conduct deep-dive audits of SEM account structures and data flows to identify technical inefficiencies, proposing scalable, code-based solutions that enhance delivery and account health.
* Strategic Workshops: Facilitate action-oriented consulting sessions with clients and internal teams to translate high-level search goals into tangible technical roadmaps and automated workflows.
* Technical Ownership & Reliability: Take full responsibility for the stability and performance of critical operational components, including feed management and custom scripts, ensuring they provide "technical insurance" for the client's media spend.
* Knowledge Scaling & Mentorship: Mentor specialists on technical SEM tactics and document best practices to build a repository of reusable solutions and foster a culture of continuous technical learning.


**What We Are Looking For ✔️**
* Experience: 4+ years of experience in the digital marketing ecosystem.
* SEM Technical Expertise: Comprehensive hands-on experience with SEM and feed management tools.
* Scripting & Automation: Ability to write and debug code (Python, JavaScript/Node.js, SQL) specifically for marketing automation and data manipulation.
* Platform Stack: Strong working knowledge of Google Ads Scripts, Google Cloud services (BigQuery, Cloud Run), and API integrations for marketing platforms.
* Analytical Mindset: Expertise in using GA4 and BigQuery to analyse large datasets and turn those insights into automated optimisation logic.
* Product Mindset: Ability to build solutions following internal standards, ensuring tools can be productized or integrated into internal platforms like Alvie.
* Strategic Communication: Excellent skills in presenting technical solutions to C-level stakeholders, turning complex data narratives into clear business initiatives.
* Self-Leadership: Highly self-driven, proactive, and able to manage complex technical projects independently.
* Emerging Tech Curiosity: A forward-leaning mindset regarding AI/Machine Learning applications within performance marketing.


**What We Offer 🌟**
*You can read our full offering in our* 
*handbook* 
*.*
* An intense learning environment where you will be able to grow and develop your skills and passions alongside some of the brightest minds in the industry.
* A culture that is built on collaboration, trust and innovation. We value having fun together - that’s why we also have regular afterworks, team events and a yearly festival.
* Transparent salary bands - check it out below on our site!
* 30 days paid leave, flexible public holidays, parental pay, a solid pension scheme and key insurance. Our different offices also offer different perks such as massage, health care contributions, free book orders, healthy snacks & great coffee, EAP programs and your choice of PC or Mac.
* A diverse environment with a high focus on inclusion and belonging. We speak 46 native languages around Precis, and our internal inclusion score is 4.5 out of 5.


 To make things as smooth as possible, please ensure your CV is in English.
   

  

**We update all candidates on their applications by email. If you don't receive an email from us, please check your spam folder.**

title: SAP Functional Consultant
description:
**Role; SAP TM Consultant** 




**Location: Stockholm, Sweden** 




**Type: Contract** 




  





**Job Responsibilities:** 



* Collaborate with integration partners and stakeholders to ensure successful SAP Business Network for Logistics (BN4L) rollouts.
* Participate in global template design workshops for SAP TM and BN4L.
* Work closely with integration teams to establish robust end-to-end processes across SAP TM, SAP ERP/S/4HANA, CPI, and BN4L.
* Act as the design authority for BN4L within the product team, ensuring alignment with global standards and integration principles.
* Configure and develop local BN4L templates as part of global rollout initiatives.
* Enable carriers and partners by managing their configuration and integration into BN4L.
* Support global rollout activities by ensuring seamless carrier and partner onboarding.
* Execute unit and system testing for BN4L and contribute to end-to-end and user acceptance testing in alignment with overall test strategy.
* Ensure smooth transition of BN4L implementations from project phase to product operations.
* Provide operational support and drive continuous improvement initiatives.
* Support change and release management processes within the BN4L product lifecycle.



  





**Technical Skills** 



* Strong expertise in SAP BN4L capabilities, including Freight Collaboration, Global Track and Trace (GTT), Material Traceability, and Intelligent Insights.
* Solid understanding of SAP logistics modules such as Transportation Management (TM), ERP, and S/4HANA, along with end-to-end freight processes.
* Experience with BN4L integration technologies, including APIs, web services, and connectivity frameworks.
* Familiarity with integration tools and protocols such as SAP CPI/PO, APIs, IDocs, and EDI.
* Knowledge of carrier automation processes and ID-based communication flows within BN4L.
* Strong understanding of transportation and logistics processes, including freight tendering, subcontracting, execution, shipment tracking, order fulfillment, dock scheduling, and carrier collaboration.
* Hands-on experience with cloud-based logistics platforms and multi-enterprise collaboration environments.
* Proven stakeholder management skills, with the ability to coordinate effectively across technical teams, carriers, and external partners in global environments.
* Excellent analytical and problem-solving capabilities, with experience managing complex logistics ecosystems.
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to translate technical concepts into clear business insights.
* Prior experience in SAP TM implementation or global rollout projects.

title: Senior Software Engineer, AI/ML, Google Meet
description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience with software development in one or more programming languages.
* 3 years of experience with one or more of the following: Speech/audio (e.g., technology duplicating and responding to the human voice), reinforcement learning (e.g., sequential decision making), ML infrastructure, or specialization in another ML field.
* 3 years of experience with ML infrastructure (e.g., model deployment, model evaluation, optimization, data processing, debugging).


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Master's degree or PhD in Computer Science or related technical field.
* 5 years of experience with data structures and algorithms.


**About the job** 
 Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
   

  

 In this role, you will be experienced in the development of machine learning models or application of AI/ML in the domains of video quality optimization, enhancement or video understanding. You will have a passion for video processing and an interest in applying your expertise to the development of technologies and features that augment the video experience for Meet users.
   

  

 Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work on spatial/temporal super-resolution video denoising, deblurring, color correction foreground segmentation and video understanding.
* Collaborate with peers and stakeholders through design and code reviews to ensure best practices amongst available technologies (e.g., style guidelines, checking code in, accuracy, testability, and efficiency).
* Contribute to the team's on-going efforts in building a complete understanding of the video quality of experience for Meet users.
* Drive AI/ML development in the video space, collaborating cross-functionally to translate emerging AI/ML innovations into tangible features that provide users with higher-order video communication capabilities.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

title: Senior Frontend Engineer, Alerting | Sweden | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

**Senior Frontend Engineer, Alerting**
**This is a remote opportunity and we would be interested in applications from Sweden.**
**The Opportunity**
 The Grafana Alerting squad operates at the core of the Grafana open-source project (link), and our mission is to provide the most in-depth way to let users manage their alerts. The backend-focused team works closely with customers and the Grafana Cloud teams to make Alerting work on-prem and at infinite scale in Cloud.
   

  

 Our Domain Is Quite Large, So To Get An Idea Of The Kind Of Work We Do, Here Are Some Projects We Recently Worked On
   

  

* Build distributed systems to scale alert ingestion and delivery of Prometheus-based alerts
* Unify Alerting setup and delivery to work the same for Grafana and Prometheus-based alerts
* Build distributed systems to scale alert evaluation of Grafana-managed alerts, reaching over 500 evaluations per second in production.


 Grafana Alerting is trusted by major organizations worldwide, monitoring essential medical devices and critical infrastructure. We thrive on collective creativity and diverse perspectives, every team member is encouraged to contribute ideas that shape our product into a dependable tool.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Take an active role in influencing our roadmap and your own career objectives
* Work with your team to deliver new features, then use the results to iterate and improve.
* Drive projects from initial ideation all the way to operations once it is in the hands of customers
* Embrace our open-source culture and contribute to other projects that may not directly fall within your team’s scope
* Design, build, operate, and maintain critical systems, owning the reliability, performance, and availability
* Be a part of your team’s on-call rotations and take ownership of the services you’re running
* Mentor and support other team members, participate in design discussions and collaborate with the team
* Learn new skills by gaining a deeper understanding of our cloud product and our customers and getting to know the codebase of a large distributed system


 As we are remote-first and our engineering organization is largely remote, we provide guidance and meet regularly using video calls, so an independent attitude and good communication skills are a must.
   

  

**What Makes You a Great Fit**
* Work with React and Typescript
* Experience with Redux Toolkit + RTKQ to handle state and HTTP requests
* Work with the grafana/ui library and Saga design system
* Emotion for styling React components
* Use of Jest, React Testing Library and MSW for unit and integration testing, ensuring the quality and reliability of codebase
* Experience with Prettier, Eslint and other tools to automate code styling
* Webpack as a bundler
* Grafana is a mono repository, use of NX and yarn for managing workspaces


**Compensation & Rewards**
 In Sweden, the compensation range for this role is SEK 775,444 - SEK 930,533. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed throughout the interview process. All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.
   

  

* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
 We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.
   

  

*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*

title: Managing Partner - Manufacturing, Industrial Products, Retail, Supply Chain
description:
**Managing Partner – Commercial Sectors (Sweden)**
**Manufacturing | Industrial Products | Retail | Supply Chain**
**IT Strategy & Digital Transformation**
**Stockholm (Hybrid)**
 Backed by the unparalleled insight of Gartner Research, Gartner Consulting enables senior business and technology leaders to navigate disruption with confidence. We combine objective, data‑driven insight with deep industry expertise to help organisations accelerate digital transformation and realise measurable value.
   

  

 As part of our continued investment in the Nordic region, we are seeking an exceptional Managing Partner to accelerate the growth of our Commercial Sectors business in Sweden. This role will complement and collaborate with our existing Partner team, expanding our capabilities, strengthening our industry coverage, and deepening our portfolio of high‑impact client engagements.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As Managing Partner, you will be the strategic lead for some of Sweden’s most influential organisations across Manufacturing, Industrial Products, Retail and Supply Chain. You will build trusted relationships with executive stakeholders, shaping their technology and digital agendas and advising on mission‑critical priorities across IT Strategy, digital transformation, applications modernisation, cloud strategy, and value realisation.
   

  

 You will have the commercial acumen to grow a substantial client portfolio, the capability to engage credibly at C‑suite level, and the consulting pedigree to oversee delivery of complex transformation programmes. This is a role for someone who can operate as a trusted consulting partner, combine strong commercial acumen with senior‑level advisory capability, and shape forward‑looking technology initiatives that translate into measurable business impact.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
 In this role, you will:
   

  

* Lead and expand Gartner’s consulting footprint within Sweden’s commercial sectors, driving growth beyond current capabilities and offerings.
* Build and sustain trusted, strategic partnerships with CEOs, CIOs, CTOs, CFOs, CDOs and senior transformation leaders.
* Shape and deliver engagements across IT Strategy (including operating models, architecture, governance and digital roadmaps), digital transformation and emerging technology adoption.
* Work closely with Gartner Research to anchor transformation programs in evidence‑based insight, while leading clients through the execution of digital and IT strategies, value‑realisation initiatives and complex transformation programmes.
* Oversee engagement delivery, ensuring measurable value, execution quality and alignment with client objectives.
* Lead sales pursuits, create compelling proposals and develop long‑term account strategies.
* Collaborate with other Nordic and EMEA Partners to strengthen cross‑sector offerings and expand our market presence.
* Mentor and support our growing Swedish Consulting team, contributing to a high‑performance, collaborative culture.


**What You Bring**
 You may currently be a Managing Director, Client Partner, Executive Director or equivalent senior leader in a top‑tier consulting firm. Alternatively, you may already be operating at Partner level and seeking the opportunity to shape a rapidly expanding Nordic practice.
   

  

 We are looking for:
   

  

* A strong commercial and sales orientation: proven success in account development, pipeline growth, and building long‑term executive relationships.
* Deep IT and management consulting experience, enabling credible advisory at senior levels.
* Expertise across one or more of these industries; Manufacturing, Industrial Products, Retail or Supply Chain sectors in Sweden/Nordics.
* Experience delivering or overseeing: C‑suite advisory on digital and technology strategy
* Digital transformation
* Applications and cloud modernisation
* IT operating model design
* Value realisation and programme assurance
* A balanced capability across strategy, execution, technology and business change.
* Strong analytical, communication and executive‑level influencing skills.


**Why This Role is Unique**
* Significant greenfield opportunity, with vast room to expand the commercial sector footprint.
* Direct access to Gartner’s global research, benchmark data and technology insights, forming a unique value proposition unmatched in the market.
* Close collaboration with experienced Nordic Partners, with the autonomy to shape new offerings and lead major client relationships.
* Cross‑Nordic and European growth potential, supported by a highly scalable operating model.


**Why Join Us?**
 This is a unique opportunity to join a world-class consulting team with a proven track record, you’ll work alongside experts who are committed to delivering meaningful change.
   

  

**Our Team Culture**
 We believe that great work starts with great people. You’ll be part of a team that is anchored in shared values, deep technology expertise, and a strong sense of purpose. We foster a culture of trust, collaboration, and continuous learning—where every voice is valued and every contribution matters.
   

  

 We also believe in flexibility. Our consultants enjoy the freedom to work from wherever they perform best—whether that’s from home, the office, or on-site with clients. What unites us is not where we work, but how we work: with integrity, curiosity, and a commitment to making a difference.
   

  

**Who are we?**
 At Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT), we guide the leaders who shape the world.
   

  

 Our mission relies on expert analysis and bold ideas to deliver actionable, objective business and technology insights, helping enterprise leaders and their teams succeed with their mission-critical priorities.
   

  

 Since our founding in 1979, we’ve grown to 21,000 associates globally who support ~14,000 client enterprises in ~90 countries and territories. We do important, interesting and substantive work that matters. That’s why we hire associates with the intellectual curiosity, energy and drive to want to make a difference. The bar is unapologetically high. So is the impact you can have here.
   

  

**What makes Gartner a great place to work?**
 Our vast, virtually untapped market potential offers limitless opportunities – opportunities that may not even exist right now – for you to grow professionally and flourish personally. How far you go is driven by your passion and performance.
   

  

 We hire remarkable people who collaborate and win as a team. Together, our singular, unifying goal is to deliver results for our clients.
   

  

 Our teams are inclusive and composed of individuals from different geographies, cultures, religions, ethnicities, races, genders, sexual orientations, abilities and generations.
   

  

 We invest in great leaders who bring out the best in you and the company, enabling us to multiply our impact and results. This is why, year after year, we are recognized worldwide as a great place to work.
   

  

**What do we offer?**
 Gartner offers world-class benefits, highly competitive compensation and disproportionate rewards for top performers.
   

  

 In our hybrid work environment, we provide the flexibility and support for you to thrive — working virtually when it's productive to do so and getting together with colleagues in a vibrant community that is purposeful, engaging and inspiring.
   

  

 Ready to grow your career with Gartner? Join us.
   

  

 The policy of Gartner is to provide equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, citizenship status, age, national origin, ancestry, disability, veteran status, or any other legally protected status and to seek to advance the principles of equal employment opportunity.
   

  

 Gartner is committed to being an Equal Opportunity Employer and offers opportunities to all job seekers, including job seekers with disabilities. If you are a qualified individual with a disability or a disabled veteran, you may request a reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in your ability to use or access the Company’s career webpage as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable accommodations by calling Human Resources at +1 (203) 964-0096 or by sending an email to ApplicantAccommodations@gartner.com.
   

  

 Job Requisition ID:100819
   

  

 By submitting your information and application, you confirm that you have read and agree to the country or regional recruitment notice linked below applicable to your place of residence.
   

  

 Gartner Applicant Privacy Link: https://jobs.gartner.com/applicant-privacy-policy
   

  

**For efficient navigation through the application, please only use the back button within the application, not the back arrow within your browser.**

title: Systemintegratör – avancerade system
description:
Vill du arbeta med systemtest i en högteknologisk och säkerhetskritisk miljö där din kompetens gör verklig skillnad?
 



 Vi söker nu en systemintegratör inom verifiering som vill arbeta med komplexa system där mjukvara och hårdvara möts. Här får du möjlighet att bidra till utvecklingen av avancerade tekniska lösningar i en miljö med höga krav på kvalitet, noggrannhet och samarbete.
 



  





**OM TJÄNSTEN:** 




 I rollen som systemintegratör arbetar du med verifiering av komplexa system i en teknikintensiv miljö. Du är delaktig i hela testprocessen – från planering och förberedelse till genomförande, analys och dokumentation.
 



 Du arbetar med systemtester där fokus ligger på mjukvara, men där samspelet med hårdvara är centralt. Rollen innebär även att du analyserar resultat från simuleringar samt säkerställer att systemen uppfyller ställda krav och kundförväntningar.
 



 Du blir en del av ett sammansvetsat team där samarbete, kunskapsdelning och ett gemensamt driv framåt är viktiga delar av kulturen. Rollen kan även innebära resor, både inom och utanför Sverige.
 



  





**ARBETSUPPGIFTER:** 



* Planera, förbereda och genomföra systemtester
* Dokumentera, analysera och följa upp testresultat
* Säkerställa att system uppfyller krav och specifikationer
* Arbeta med verifieringsrapporter och teknisk dokumentation
* Delta i felsökning och problemlösning tillsammans med utvecklingsteam
* Bidra till förbättringar och viss automatisering av testmiljöer
* Utvärdera resultat från simuleringar



  





**VI SÖKER DIG SOM:** 



* Har en civil- eller högskoleingenjörsexamen inom relevant område
* Har minst 3 års erfarenhet som systemintegratör, systemtekniker eller nätverksspecialist
* Har erfarenhet av verifiering och test samt att ta fram verifieringsrapporter
* Har god förståelse för både mjukvara och hårdvara
* Har erfarenhet av nätverk och systemmiljöer
* Talar och skriver obehindrat på svenska och engelska



  





**VI TROR ATT DU ÄR:** 




 En strukturerad och analytisk person som trivs med att arbeta metodiskt och noggrant. Du har ett kvalitetsfokus och en förmåga att planera och dokumentera ditt arbete på ett tydligt sätt.
 



 Du tycker om att arbeta nära både mjukvara och hårdvara och har ett intresse för att förstå hur komplexa system hänger ihop. Som person är du samarbetsinriktad, prestigelös och bidrar till en positiv teamkänsla.
 



 Du drivs av att lösa tekniska problem och är nyfiken på att utforska nya områden inom avancerad teknik.
 



  





**Om anställningen:** 




 Detta är ett konsultuppdrag vilket innebär att du kommer att vara anställd av Friday.
 



*Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där kund har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.* 




  





**Övrig info:** 



* Omfattning: Heltid
* Start: Enligt överenskommelse
* Placering: Stockholm
* Rekryteringsansvarig: Hedvig Svärd
* Lön: Fast månadslön



  





 Ansök genom att klicka på länken nedan. Kom ihåg att vara snabb med din ansökan då vi gör löpande urval av kandidater och att annonsen kan stängs ner innan tjänsten är tillsatt om vi gått över till urvals och intervjufasen. Vi tar inte emot ansökningar via mail.
 



  





**Om Friday:** 




*På Friday brinner vi för att ge dig som Tech-talang en riktigt bra start på karriären. Genom att lyssna på vad just du vill och drivs av, matchar vi dig med företag och möjligheter som får dig att se fram emot att gå till jobbet.* 




*Vi värderar ambition och potential högt och arbetar aktivt för en fördomsfri rekrytering, där alla ges samma chans att lyckas.* 




*Vi finns i Stockholm, Göteborg, Malmö, Linköping och Örebro. Varje år genomför vi över 5 000 karriärmöten och matchar kandidater med allt från globala företag till innovativa startups.*

title: Senior Fullstack Engineer - Frontend Focus
description:
**Join our highly skilled team of developers - breaking new ground and shaping the future of retail.** 




  





**We dare to dream big, we have the courage to keep raising the bar, and we’re committed to being a force for good in retail - helping both established and fast-growing brands meet the ever-changing expectations of their customers.** 




  





**Sitoo is a fast-growing technology company exploring how far we can take innovation to deliver the world’s best Unified Commerce Platform and Point of Sale. Our technology is used in more than 20 countries - a number that keeps growing thanks to our incredible team of engineers. And we have no intention of slowing down. Are you the Software Engineer we’re looking for?** 




  





**Your Mission at Sitoo** 




  





 As a Fullstack Engineer at Sitoo, you'll play a vital role in building our next-generation web products. You'll join a small, agile team focused on developing the world's best Point of Sales and Unified Commerce Platform. Your work will span front and backend applications built with React, TypeScript, and Node.js. In our small team environment, your impact and influence will be significant.
 



  





**What you'll do** 




  




* Own, develop and operate Sitoo’s web products
* Collaborate with the team to innovate and improve processes and tooling
* Build a scalable infrastructure in AWS
* Write tests to ensure product quality
* Manage CI/CD pipelines on GitHub
* Participate in development guilds



  





**What you'll bring to the table** 




  




* 5+ years of experience as a professional fullstack developer building and maintaining web applications
* Experience writing Node.js services and frontend apps with TypeScript
* A background working in fast-growing or scaling environments
* Experience in cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP)
* Fluency in English, both written and spoken



  





**Bonus** 




  




* Azure DevOps, Github Actions or GitLab CI/CD
* IaC with CDK or similar
* E2E tests with Playwright
* AI-assisted integrated development environment or agentic coding tools like Claude Code, GitHub Copilot or Cursor
* Working with design systems / documentation in Storybook



  





**Why Sitoo** 




  





 We are forward thinkers. By turning curiosity into knowledge — and knowledge into continuous improvement — we break new ground and shape the future of retail.
 



  





 We believe in an inclusive culture where everyone feels like they belong. We support each other, win together, celebrate success together, and overcome challenges together.
 



  





 Today, we are close to 115 dedicated experts with a positive and solution-oriented mindset. Most importantly, we take care of each other, and we never forget to have fun.

title: Senior Field Marketing Manager
description:
At Snowflake, we are powering the era of the agentic enterprise. To usher in this new era, we seek AI-native thinkers across every function who are energized by the opportunity to reinvent how they work. You don’t just use tools; you possess an innate curiosity, treating AI as a high-trust collaborator that is core to how you solve problems and accelerate your impact. We look for low-ego individuals who thrive in dynamic and fast-moving environments and move with an experimental mindset — who rapidly test emerging capabilities to discover simpler, more powerful ways to deliver results. At Snowflake, your role isn't just to execute a function, but to help redefine the future of how work gets done.
   

  

 We are hiring a Senior Field Marketing Manager for our Marketing team. This is a strategic, senior-level role at the heart of Snowflake's EMEA go-to-market. You will own the field marketing strategy for the Scandinavian countries, shaping how Snowflake shows up in market across an enterprise buyer landscape that is increasingly shaped by AI. Beyond running your own programs, you will set the direction for how the region markets, mentor junior marketers, and bring a point of view on what the Nordics market needs that influence the broader EMEA strategy.
   

  

**AS A SENIOR FIELD MARKETING MANAGER AT SNOWFLAKE, YOU WILL:**
* Define and own the field marketing strategy for Scandinavia, setting the regional approach to pipeline generation, brand presence, and customer engagement
* Own the full event life cycle for the region - Drive logistics, operations and execution of all planned events. Help shape event themes, close collaboration with local marketing team, work with outside vendors, oversee fulfillment/inventory levels, manage events’ sales staffing etc.
* Build and execute a comprehensive integrated marketing calendar spanning field events, executive programs, ABM campaigns, and digital demand generation
* Serve as the primary marketing stakeholder for the Scandinavia sales leadership team, co-developing go-to-market plans and aligning marketing investment to revenue priorities
* Maintain direct alignment with sales team in terms of all pre and post-event communication, marketing-driven campaigns, and event promotion strategy
* Drive account-based marketing at scale for the region's most strategic accounts, coordinating across marketing disciplines to deliver cohesive, high-impact programs
* Mentor and provide guidance to junior field marketing team members across EMEA, raising the team's collective capability and program quality
* Contribute to EMEA-wide marketing strategy discussions, bringing Nordics market insight and challenging assumptions about how and where the team
* Invests
* Collaborate with the alliances' organization on Snowflake’s strategic sponsorships and go-to-market execution plan at partner events
* Establish measurement frameworks and reporting cadences that connect marketing activity to pipeline, revenue influence, and customer expansion


**OUR IDEAL SENIOR FIELD MARKETING MANAGER WILL HAVE:**
* 8+ years of experience in field marketing, regional marketing, or demand generation in enterprise B2B technology
* Proven ability to define and own a regional marketing strategy, not just execute against one
* Proven track record of negotiation skills with vendors and suppliers.
* Track record of building trusted, peer-level relationships with sales leadership and influencing joint planning without direct authority
* Deep experience running executive engagement programs and high-stakes fieldevents that deliver measurable pipeline outcomes
* Experience running 300+ attendee events.
* Strong command of account-based marketing strategy, from account selection through multi-channel activation and measurement
* Proficiency in marketing automation, CRM, and analytics platforms as supporting tools; experience using AI workflows to drive scale and efficiency is strongly preferred
* Fluency in English; fluency in Swedish; and another Nordic language is a significant plus.
* The role requires 3 days onsite in our Snowflake Offices


**BONUS POINTS FOR THE FOLLOWING:**
* Experience shaping field marketing strategy across multiple EMEA sub-regions or markets simultaneously
* Background in cloud data, analytics, or AI platform marketing in the Nordics enterprise landscape
* Track record of mentoring or developing junior marketers in a distributed team environment
* Experience with AI or GenAI tools (such as Cortex AI) to accelerate campaign creation, personalization, or audience intelligence
* Familiarity with Snowflake's go-to-market motion or comparable enterprise data platform ecosystems


 Snowflake is growing fast, and we’re scaling our team to help enable and accelerate our growth. We are looking for people who share our values, challenge ordinary thinking, and push the pace of innovation while building a future for themselves and Snowflake.
   

  

 How do you want to make your impact?
   

  

 For jobs located in the United States, please visit the job posting on the Snowflake Careers Site for salary and benefits information: careers.snowflake.com

title: Software Architect - Mobile
description:
**About Air Apps**
 At Air Apps, we believe in thinking bigger- and moving faster. We’re a family-founded company on a mission to create the world’s first AI-powered Personal & Entrepreneurial Resource Planner (PRP), and we need your passion and ambition to help us change how people plan, work, and live. Born in Lisbon, Portugal, in 2018 - and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco - we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management - and change lives along the way.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**The Role**
 As a
 **Mobile Software Architect** 
 at Air Apps, you will take the lead in designing scalable and performant mobile architecture for our suite of applications - primarily focused on iOS, with cross-functional knowledge of Android development considered a plus.
   

  

 You will collaborate with product, design, and engineering teams to craft elegant and efficient solutions that support millions of users globally. This is a strategic and technical leadership role where your decisions will influence the long-term evolution of our mobile ecosystem.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Define and lead the mobile architecture strategy, ensuring a scalable and maintainable foundation across projects.
* Focus primarily on iOS architecture, libraries, and platform-specific patterns, while maintaining an understanding of Android frameworks.
* Collaborate with engineers, designers, and product managers to ensure architectural decisions align with product goals and user experience.
* Establish and enforce coding standards, design patterns, and performance guidelines.
* Lead architectural reviews and provide guidance on refactoring and scaling existing mobile applications.
* Design APIs, SDKs, and modular components that can be reused across teams.
* Guide decisions around third-party libraries, mobile tooling, and build/deployment pipelines.
* Partner with backend and cloud teams to ensure seamless integration between mobile apps and services.
* Stay current with the latest trends and best practices in mobile architecture, performance, and security.
* Mentor mobile engineers and help elevate the team’s technical proficiency.


**Requirements**
* Around 6+ years of experience in mobile development with a strong architectural mindset.
* Deep expertise in iOS development using Swift (Objective-C knowledge is a plus).
* Solid understanding of UIKit, SwiftUI, Combine, and other modern iOS frameworks.
* Experience with app performance optimization, modularization, and offline-first strategies.
* Familiarity with Android development (Kotlin/Java) is a strong plus.
* Experience integrating with APIs, handling mobile data storage, caching, and background tasks.
* Strong knowledge of App Store submission, mobile security, and compliance guidelines.
* Experience with mobile CI/CD pipelines, testing frameworks, and deployment automation.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to explain architectural concepts to both technical and non-technical team members.
* Passion for clean code, design patterns (MVVM, VIPER, etc.), and scalable architecture.


**What benefits do we offer?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Annual Bonus
* Top-tier Health and Life Insurance for peace of mind.
* Transportation Budget to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Childcare support.
* Air Conference - an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.
* Pension Fund to support your long-term financial planning.
* Urban Sports Club membership to keep you active.
* Meals 100% free at the hub.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Senior Backend Software Engineer, Alerting | Sweden | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

**Senior Backend Engineer, Alerting**
**This is a remote opportunity and we would be interested in applications from Sweden.**
**The Opportunity**
 The Grafana Alerting squad operates at the core of the Grafana open-source project (link), and our mission is to provide the most in-depth way to let users manage their alerts. The backend-focused team works closely with customers and the Grafana Cloud teams to make Alerting work on-prem and at infinite scale in Cloud.
   

  

 Our Domain Is Quite Large, So To Get An Idea Of The Kind Of Work We Do, Here Are Some Projects We Recently Worked On
   

  

* Build distributed systems to scale alert ingestion and delivery of Prometheus-based alerts
* Unify Alerting setup and delivery to work the same for Grafana and Prometheus-based alerts
* Build distributed systems to scale alert evaluation of Grafana-managed alerts, reaching over 500 evaluations per second in production.


 Grafana Alerting is trusted by major organizations worldwide, monitoring essential medical devices and critical infrastructure. We thrive on collective creativity and diverse perspectives, every team member is encouraged to contribute ideas that shape our product into a dependable tool.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Take an active role in influencing our roadmap and your own career objectives
* Work with your team to deliver new features, then use the results to iterate and improve.
* Drive projects from initial ideation all the way to operations once it is in the hands of customers
* Embrace our open-source culture and contribute to other projects that may not directly fall within your team’s scope
* Design, build, operate, and maintain critical systems, owning the reliability, performance, and availability
* Be a part of your team’s on-call rotations and take ownership of the services you’re running
* Mentor and support other team members, participate in design discussions and collaborate with the team
* Learn new skills by gaining a deeper understanding of our cloud product and our customers and getting to know the codebase of a large distributed system


 As we are remote-first and our engineering organization is largely remote, we provide guidance and meet regularly using video calls, so an independent attitude and good communication skills are a must.
   

  

**What Makes You a Great Fit**
* You are a motivated self starter with a bias towards action
* You are customer focused
* We build everything with our users in mind.
* You have a passion for creating intuitive products that fit customers’ needs
* Pragmatism: You are able to take on complex challenges and break them down to achieve short feedback loops: to analyze, design, and build modular solutions, deliver MVPs, gather data and feedback and then progress iteratively
* Collaboration and communication: The smallest unit we have is a team. You’ll be working with your teammates in a fully remote setup. Good communication skills are a must
* Solid experience with at least one programming language. We use Go, but if you have familiarity with Python, Java, C++, Rust or similar then that translates well
* Some experience with delivering projects from gathering requirements, brainstorming ideas all the way to shipping a product to the customer’s hands in a self-driven way
* Some experience with developing software that runs in the Cloud or some experience with systems engineering
* Experience writing clean, robust, and performant software that is easily maintained by others


**Compensation & Rewards**
 In Sweden, the compensation range for this role is SEK 775,444 - SEK 930,533. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed throughout the interview process. All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.
   

  

* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
 We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.
   

  

*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*
